name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Activist doctors are harming our children
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziecosh6jool4of6eb23rtn8hm6kja8ig13vt8kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqn5j9g4r5us555en1481bkfnin7k9pgmb4rt4tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3e2dpe9la3ajcfpv61bl0o8j881ujcube59953g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtifjeimvl2cgiqir23i2v8oqu5vi2ou3sf3dt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu9m1finlrjfi25rc63f6j1q2gaia8mfgs5ne0ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcucudlpbvrfbhoajrp05so7n4mh6okm7fg8gpig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq0nsdua43la62ek6v3dqguoqgusebrd3vso09kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb8c3alrkdbsb1tsgu6v2khehgl0enskoecvct90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7vkncns0pfbt19j60rpms03gpvhn2kn2ep0pp20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj64ob1cph2bs)

### _Friday, March 10, 2023_
I don’t know about you but can we just have some honesty. From a White House that gives Women’s awards to Men, to NFL oligarchs, and awards for movies nobody watches. James and I cover it all, guaranteed to offend someone so grab your seat belt and hang on. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/jftnvmzzvptwppkzwttdbwfpcvwqmccprmdkcrtjrjvvrm_qdsffvvsvwsdtmfphgsdfnn.html)

### _Wednesday, March 8, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with former Congressman Jason Lewis of Minnesota. Jason had a great career in radio, even being a regular fill in for the great Rush Limbaugh. He then made the choice to not just talk about it but to make a difference. He tells his story from the Radio mic to the halls of Congress! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/bblzgqssgnjynnmsyjjtpybnvgycqvvnlqtmvljflfgglb_qdsffvvsvwsdtmfphgsdfnn.html)
| [ They know what’s in your Wallet ](http://click1.srnemail.com/kflpvsbbvzrjzzqbjrrgljfzwvjdswwzhsgqwhrmhmvvhp_qdsffvvsvwsdtmfphgsdfnn.html)
### _Monday, March 6, 2023_
Have you ever heard of the CFPB? Probably not but they control or have input into how you spend your money or how you have access to credit. They are a group that many believe were set up unconstitutionally and now the Supreme Court is finally taking a look. Join John Berlau from CEI talks about this case and a lot more dealing with the economy. You don’t want to miss it. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/dcjjcmllcbrfbbwlfrrntfsbzcfdmzzbpmnwzprhphcchg_qdsffvvsvwsdtmfphgsdfnn.html)

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7svrlttscllkro1d3oop18qneqjbu2sdg0j95h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o36c1h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z80mvoe18bgfeimpkug2trhvuto0vbp75n72c1q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o36c1h2bs)

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fd78p0vsnrt2t84ggpc1fo8cc8vg3vjpvaqkpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitb4fo8mut8a4hh5so0u27ds7s6k0jtg3v2njk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1i7q2shfkmrc6m4clik0h15u3js0tc8pc3o71s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztp7238bn57q2uiu1f3noghe6fa13oimmonatm8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcarg2ss1cipp6oqbtqe4mqhulpouiklpr65r690_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z81aqpd31mbo8h72hnb8dnt14qnpt2io5ga1sqlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj66o32clh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Peter,
---
The liberal media is now calling me the "anti-AOC".
---
_**I 'll happily wear that label as a badge of honor. **_

_AOC and her fellow socialists hate everything about America. They want to completely tear down our country and fundamentally transform it into a tyrannical far-Left dystopia._

**Meanwhile, I 've made it my mission to stop their radical, freedom-crushing agenda by DRAINING THE SWAMP and making Washington accountable to YOU once again. **

Will you stand with me today to help me stop these radical socialists who are hell-bent on DESTROYING our country?

As we look toward the future, our mission to end gerrymandering and restore equity and justice to our democracy is still central to the fight for fair maps. Pushing back against gerrymandering is no longer a fight we wait for every ten years - we are now in a perpetual battle for fairness.
In 2024, fair representation is on the line with 29 seats across 14 states active litigation alone could significantly impact. We are already certain of 3 states that plan to redraw their maps before 2024, and there could be more.
[**Bottomline, the future of our fight for fair maps is now — day after day.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60022505/395779845/2009655800?refcode=20230311_AOTL_F_BizNews_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzBmNWExLTBjYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UpDTpP6uHOjmIaWHSPNoRfbFNJeUjPGTwCvYQdeoueU=)
We are doubling down on our multi-prong approach from the past couple of years to tackle this new era of constant redistricting. And our work can only be effective with a sustainable source of grassroots-driven funding.
Each month we are on-the-ground organizing to empower folks to contact legislators, attend hearings, and make their voices heard as we anticipate redraws in North Carolina, Ohio, and Texas and local elections in 2023. And your support will help us better plan for the fight ahead.
[SUPPORT ALL ON THE LINE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60022508/395779848/2009655800?refcode=20230311_AOTL_F_BizNews_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzBmNWExLTBjYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UpDTpP6uHOjmIaWHSPNoRfbFNJeUjPGTwCvYQdeoueU=)

\-- Biz

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422841:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422841:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422841:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422841:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **
**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422842:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>

Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422841:JT-BtPGNs:m:1:3331421248:CE673C20E73DF20D2B82A5FE768270B3:r)**
****
** **
****
Thank you,

Kash Patel

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmpacc6j964m6ntreovrd4u6or0gfvlq0gcn44ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za3pa0b6aun7t9pb9ihe1fs4hkf4fsmif9g1pqj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmlpbdh59v9t2qfc2e4ndrvqgbvvqu10r2ri6r60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zut97i2nla77khoupfnbtteofvdlpiae985sh4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zumskcato6gs2bo92ff7bqkdhusvb6sv49bu7me0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv31an18cjts9fa333iuncv814j14gn7cstq3098_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt75u80huq8hmjhj2bm8meb5djquso4njg2koab8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fp4d9hqh3su4oop79aputrohcj6di9c77mvsa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs) **

[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znfbd04lkciggreohr6mef2j9n8fj9ttnu1m2m78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6rgfcbjui2dahvv2kq4uivmtseeo9g0kru2c1mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)
**[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsriffu3679td0ca4j3s0omj4kovo4leu6ltkbg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _“insurrectionists,”_ then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**Friend, I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3dcgc8j6cf9vn45sad5kumc97rc0tufdaeol2no_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)

I know all about this firsthand. I’ve seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I’ve even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **

**[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztasia2o8klb0lsojra3gv32obe27b0m7g3usdo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or3c9h2bs)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Jon Tester is a fantastic Democratic Senator from Montana whose family still runs their own farm? How great is it that this 7-fingered dirt farmer is real, and is a Senator who sides with working families across the country? Pretty great, right?! Are you all in to send him back to the Senate, too?
body:
He’s real & he’s on our side.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6763a95f-6ff4-498f-b143-8c0b9ec94675/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**It's official, he's in!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79146183-9d95-4dc5-ad7e-9803829d7814/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "he" is Jon Tester, and it's incredible news because it's such a key race for us to hold our majority. But also because of the kind of person Jon Tester is._ _**Tester shocked the political world in 2006, knocking off an incumbent GOP Senator. He did this because he is, and always has been, the real deal.** _ **From Tester himself:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7c827ea-3657-4ac7-bc05-ebc1a8b33298/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else._** [**_Will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4485b66-cb17-4411-848c-21c2474af330/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_He's always there for Democratic priority legislation, because he knows it benefits _his_ _people_. Never feels a need to position himself vs our party for some narcissistic need for attention, or fear he appears too "liberal," like Sinema & Manchin. Again, because, _he's the real deal-_ -he's "Yellowstone," no performance required_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66da154e-bae8-4e1d-935d-7b4e389c3663/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _How many politicians do you think this would describe?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8621044e-5ae7-459d-8cf9-8fd59da77e7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But even with his talent and authenticity, Tester will only stay a Senator, fighting our fights from Montana & Washington, if we provide him the resources so every Montantan hears his story, sees his huge smile. And we'll only hold our Senate majority if we reelect Sen. Tester--the math just isn't there without him._** **_[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85ce5075-970b-4e31-976c-152f00559bd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [**_So will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb33d425c-c1c6-4c64-bd5d-0eb5031eff92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thanks for fighting to keep the good ones. We need them now, more than ever._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d544fc9-0260-4ca9-9fe1-c5aedf38ced1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6krm3u3gb10o4nd6c9fqkfl9c4uh7dc49citvk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z83aaj7dog6mcrc7vs7lro805v2j3vpv9dkf5fs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or6cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z037l74bdi54p6nump5q6rfg0ns3lv7bpv2c5b90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or6cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zslem7fgpq4p53mcluhqc5bf924m3817ihjbhbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu73afi6tc0oim1hkhs3b6qq4qcsiqvj3mdvt5t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsmpubqh8cqqhobk3kkh0mt4g8p73vrltv0reu80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4k6hpkdsmej4fhvdc8n7tnt369j0lneonqg6850_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slj69or7clh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Right Wing Report
subject: Biden intends to sign UN Gun Ban
body:
[unsubscribe](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkM1uhCAAhJ9Gj4R_8OCh2db3AEXBgiCwuvr03fbcZJI5TPJN8pkecSEZI1DQduq17Do6t67HEBNIEEKcUkIBAlDwoaMSD1JS8vh6NBRmt9h6um3JJsVcwRhDa_tx6mYhoeZccsqpnBFTEE9wlIgabVgbesY71gkiW9_bWlNDPho8vFPzN_gH-juS4fX0DfmMLB2XOXM8A9s0YnW2ZulqjWlit9ZSWd3FKxtl1JhUMbeNjpfsgpeC35P3m1m8I7PTa5TVLabEVaf9PkeGny4cm6xGpbnB3Dj7_vu-g9xKXXnKYRXa3qKsx7FdZRdEq8W2uZ_S6bx3hYu3kyUo5_9M1P4FctavEQIy7xCU86CxvovcAQGnOKYrEDtkF5gFnQhA9tx_AIWGgrE)
---
Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. The Globalist Gun Control Agenda is back from the dead
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel for decades.

They've been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House **so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate**.

Now they think they finally see their opportunity to _ram it through_!

But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- **[as long as we take IMMEDIATE action to help dismantle this dangerous Treaty](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtUEmO5SAUO83PEjGFB4ssWlX97wEJBJKQgfDJcPpO1bolS7ZsybJsGyJA1jXDwKuuMVIp7qrQUEwZZoQQwTnjiCAM4q24pG8pOfv6-_XiOIXe5yPMfbLrkjJql1j5xlpnMW2VAqlqMIR0lgnttDJacaVcFZtaqFoBk9XU-JzXF_vzou8HOY3oP6U_IXufeXqxby4YmwYvrxUXP89XewZ_T6ELerO6HCTFxxSW5FXfmztLPEyu7374ACTLOu_z0omrvaJddq4Px6PHvqaHjNA6xyL79GM6OcjFMl_MQNp8jXQa5zYAHimUwVif0hxJjqatC8bnuaawewCYb5HxI2dquo8uWXREv6iwwT_DxzvKec-DWFMcwPgb9qGU-do3YEb3vkpNtx5hmsIu4Dm3jzpMv5fm5kQpmbPFiLkNo_0ofMkPsTsSFLSgfECw4fpCDnjHEPHH9g8vPZxo)**.

As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it's absolutely critical we act now!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Dear Fellow Patriot,

"BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY."

That was the headline in the _Washington Examiner_ shortly after President Biden's State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of "_the continuing commitment of the United States_ " to the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland.

Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating:
> "We'll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments, like **_support for arms control measures_** to reduce the risk and enhance transparency."
Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn't use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED.

The battle over implementation of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers' designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators "NO UN GUN BAN" at once](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkM2OpSAUhJ_muiTAQX4WLibdc98DRQSVqyIi-vRj93oqldSikkrl6xvChaxrwIJVpmmlUsxWvqGYAgZCCGcMGCIIC_5WTNK3lAy-_n69GI5-cOn0nyH26xIT6pZQuaYzSlmOiTSsJZ3oFNe9MLrjoHqrCFShqbmqlQBZzY1LaX3Bnxd9P05xQv8Z_SnhXdL8gu_QgnCxzDTZYznW6RFkvPl5GFXUMPZhupkMVJPZaNHekFRW_ljtXEdyG3kGQ7IWpaOytPRas1nOT8IYSqG0Hjq1rIQoOXNnRFrr-zopEY7iZdo4Nifurt5Txtlo9RHzMTLNF1JysV4YtuN-mnJNsPUvynvvnsPTHeRnTyNfYxhF626xjzl_rn0T0OrBVbEx6-nn2e9cPFCHoP38izI1BcXYlg4jsBtG-5nZkp6AOxDkNadsRGLD9YWsYAYQcef2D7Awljg)**!

As you'll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN "Small Arms Treaty" in the U.S. Senate.

_If there's anything we've learned, it's that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed "need" for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" for years_.

From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members.

But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty," they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban!

They don't care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists.

_They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans_!

Reading through the details of the UN "Small Arms Treaty," it's hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified.

For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identity "end users" (gun buyers), document "the quantity, value, and model/type" of firearms and ammunition, and develop "national control standards" to regulate transfers.

_In other words, by design it's an International Gun Registry that'll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION_.

Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China.

**[As you can see, it's vital you sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators demanding they reject this scheme](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkMuOpiAQhZ9GlwQo5LJwMeme_z1QVFDwgoiXpx-711OppJJTyck5X1cTLmRVARasNHUjlWJ96WqKKWAghHDGgCGCsOAfxST9SMng6-9XwXB0g02nm4fYrUtMqF1CaeueguHAqCKcgqbAeqFeqxb3shOqNWWoK64qJUCWvrYprQX8Kejn3RQn9B_Tnyd8ruQL-A4NCBsvT1N_LMc6vQMZb84Po4oaJqINzvSmjb51Nei9l8-WX2Em5jnI7LN7lssM_C3VH4M6rUlsFo2HUa7ibhkcpuuWFtsgKJFSket41JZ3Z8F5uq9syk038mcUjMpT6LCOvsnt1QnZhautfJraMFyqoLxz9g08PUHOexr5GsMoGvuIfcx5vvdNQKMHW8barKfz3u1cvFCHoJ3_RZnqC8XYXC1G0G8Y7WdmS3oPPIEgpzllIxIbrm7UC2YAEXtu_wBme5b7)**!

Once a nation signs on, the UN's goal is to quickly impose "International Small Arms Control Standards" (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: *** _Mandated national "screening" for those seeking to own guns_ , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you're "competent" enough to own a firearm; *** _Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales_ , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; *** _Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any "properly-licensed" individual may legally own_ ; *** _Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds_ ; and *** _Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense_ \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you're "connected" -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden's paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs.

Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed they're pouring money into the UN "Small Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist.

_So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it_!

**[I'm counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtUMuOrSAA-xpdEl7yWLi4mbnnP0RUQFEExMfXX2fWt2nSRZO26dAixkXTEMhprVslpKRjbVsMMYEEIcQoJRQgADn7SCrwRwhKvv5-VRRGO5l82nWKQ9hiBv3ma9Nq1OtGUQUbpLAWhGINoURyaCTjqBe1bxsmG8mJqJfW5Bwq8qfCn5c5zuA_oT8m-Vx5qci3V4SbeC04j8d2hPkFKXC3y-Rk7Mi84hKcnbFe5fnkxxeI5Njc00CDmXfbl6M8j0n9QRHaLjtwfXV-jjMVpgvkyk6xsySOS3fbi_gp3Yv0M3RJj48Lmyrel9JzZs9yo9PGRNQTsrv6Q45Jx7duX88uTBVmgzXv4PnxYk3ZsRC948o8PLlS1jvtnKhuMnVsdTjtstjE-Hvq5Du7_F6Z2wvEqK4eAjLuEKSz0C2_Qh6PgO0Ypg7wHTY3GDnVBCBz7v8Abp2bBA)**.

As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden's pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote.

But we can't wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are these gun controls deep into every part of government.

_On top of Biden's ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill shows how "Democrats' latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership" involves new State Department "sanctions" designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports_.

That's the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN "Small Arms Treaty."

_Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it's under the guise of "public health_."

So now Biden's Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _"Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy."_

That's why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" is not enough.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I'm counting on your help to send that message -- before it's too late.

**[First, please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators "NO UN GUN BAN" at once](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtUM2upSAYe5rjkvDzIbBwMbl3znugooDgDyLqefrx3vU0Tbpo2jQ1DamF5JxhAVXftFIpGCrXUEwZZoSQGoABIgiL-q1A0reUwL7-fr0AJzfafLp5TGZdUkbdEivbPDYFMKYDCaLrOkHJ0BNCqcFYmbatYsNrxZVgsgqNzXl9sT8v-n6Y04T-U_pjsveVw4t9x5YJm65A83Asxzo9YAVvLoxeJc2mc5_7pY_UeJc53CD7xKkRTAkMm8m5QJrawKIDr-q1hNJ3Mrbcw3mE49xtb68lFg2S0R6mNVmd7JKPDeuyWa2Iv8kai2itD3y8rvoa8kx2uPQQx9uDw-fgxoPrF62Ns8_g6RPlvGdfryn6J_cRuy9lvvdNsFaPtkpNv54uBLfX4jl1jNqF3ytzc6GU2qvDiA0bRvtZYMmPsE8kyOmagkdiw_xGg4CeIWLP7R-9p5iM)**.

Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- using everything from U.S. Mail, to phones, to email, blogs, and guest editorials, hard-hitting video and even paid media if we can raise resources.

If at all possible, I'm hoping you'll agree to $100.

I know that's a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It's on. There's no time to wait.

clean_body: Dear Patriot, Below are links to some of the most important news stories today for your consideration. Courtesy of Right Wing Report. The Globalist Gun Control Agenda is back from the dead Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations' "Small Arms Treaty" has been the Gun Control Lobby's crown jewel for decades. They've been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate. Now they think they finally see their opportunity to ram it through! But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- . As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it's absolutely critical we act now! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) Dear Fellow Patriot, "BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY." That was the headline in the Washington Examiner shortly after President Biden's State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of "the continuing commitment of the United States " to the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland. Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: "We'll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments, like support for arms control measures to reduce the risk and enhance transparency." Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn't use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED. The battle over implementation of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers' designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch. ! As you'll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN "Small Arms Treaty" in the U.S. Senate. If there's anything we've learned, it's that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed "need" for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" for years. From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members. But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN's "Small Arms Treaty," they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban! They don't care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists. They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans! Reading through the details of the UN "Small Arms Treaty," it's hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified. For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identity "end users" (gun buyers), document "the quantity, value, and model/type" of firearms and ammunition, and develop "national control standards" to regulate transfers. In other words, by design it's an International Gun Registry that'll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION. Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China. ! Once a nation signs on, the UN's goal is to quickly impose "International Small Arms Control Standards" (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: Mandated national "screening" for those seeking to own guns , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you're "competent" enough to own a firearm; Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any "properly-licensed" individual may legally own ; Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds ; and Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you're "connected" -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden's paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand "utopian" designs. Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed they're pouring money into the UN "Small Arms Treaty" hand-over-fist. So, it's no wonder why they're hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden's pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote. But we can't wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are these gun controls deep into every part of government. On top of Biden's ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill shows how "Democrats' latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership" involves new State Department "sanctions" designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports. That's the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN "Small Arms Treaty." Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it's under the guise of "public health." So now Biden's Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says "Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy." That's why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" is not enough. We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for. But I'm counting on your help to send that message -- before it's too late. . Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN's "Small Arms Treaty" -- using everything from U.S. Mail, to phones, to email, blogs, and guest editorials, hard-hitting video and even paid media if we can raise resources. If at all possible, I'm hoping you'll agree to $100. I know that's a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It's on. There's no time to wait. . Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There's no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN "Small Arms Treaty" any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States. name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfrb6f1efugjsadoe0hikut9mf1ldh9m3d7blung_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slgm8ob2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcb7uv4952i7oeullelqiv02nupisdpicoa26o28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slgm8ob2clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zge3f346t0a5viudv64f5s3tffg7snpb4qcrvfgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slgm8ob2clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar

| |
---
| | | This CAN’T be real. My team intercepted an internal Democrat communication from Ilhan Omar to her top supporters, and well, you have to see it to believe it:

---
_**GOOD NEWS:** As it stands, we've received nearly 2.5x as many grassroots contributions in February as we had at this point in January. That's incredible, Judy -- and it's all thanks to grassroots supporters like you stepping up when it mattered most to our campaign._
_-Ilhan Omar_
---

If this is true, we’re in _trouble._ Ilhan’s radical agenda is _gaining_ steam amongst her leftist base - they’re _**flooding**_ her coffers with cash. At this rate, she’ll have MILLIONS in the bank to **spread** her socialist ideology and **expand** Democrat control.

Together, we successfully **KICKED** Ilhan off the Foreign Affairs Committee, a great victory for our nation’s national security. However, that means she’s got _even more_ time on her hands to cozy up to Hollywood donors and leftist elitists.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The media is trying to hide their lies
body:
MRC won’t rest until no American trusts in the woke, radical media. And here’s how we do it!

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Ck7BCXjeEYcA8eSekte4A&sysid=1)

Friend,

The radical corporate media are trying to hide all the lies they told over the years. But the truth is coming out...

**Major revelations this week show the media, in collusion with Democrats, lied to voters and the American people. **
They lied about
* COVID
* George Floyd
* Hunter Biden's laptop
* January 6th

What else have they been lying about, Friend?

I’ve set a goal to reach 600 new supporters this week to DESTROY the woke radical media’s influence. Will you join us in defending the truth?

DESTROY the Woke Media
__________________________________________________________________

**GOAL:** 600 New Donors
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Supporter Status: PENDING**

[_**Become an MRC Supporter Today >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mO4JnTJxFdOug38Qf77o7Q&sysid=1)

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I’m the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to **exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media** and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

MRC won’t rest until no American trusts in the woke, radical media. And here’s how we do it!

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 900,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**THIRD:** MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Friend, I hope I can count on your support in destroying the media’s stranglehold on America.

**Click below to join the fight for the truth.**

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2df87e27ed4243619157a01ac5866b11&_e=8wTxoNHRmyIxgBd0SKERWUBZkd4mXKFoBTLIJ0LDJZO3sWeCxYbwPni_w-3OaLu4Pn-RgiJtZIwXR-aPXxpZd1Ng9vh4tlBPx4spzpX80ATg2E-JwjtLLksN4ojE4IUqBq8gi8bAVeRBaJ9TTfUd9WsLOpIeO8z00jFJlkqvbvTrawSq75XaONado7FL1wq94IgtKCm_3hE-QranltL1IpvrAjF053z0IK4YdIeE7J28J48D5HF1f0BoylOfkEl-T-xI3My8_0ZF5wNpkBqWv2cuEfjT61ddlYW5Hv5jArBf8uS7ytYHZNyFK_Vr648qvyEdaoqMiEjGiykXHLy4z9gUob6DEOJY4H1A4nTKSKLafAQsB7pq5FEmAfBoAe-pOIpb1GGSBzRDmhgV7Fg4sA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2df87e27ed4243619157a01ac5866b11&_e=8wTxoNHRmyIxgBd0SKERWUBZkd4mXKFoBTLIJ0LDJZO3sWeCxYbwPni_w-3OaLu4Pn-RgiJtZIwXR-aPXxpZd1Ng9vh4tlBPx4spzpX80ATg2E-JwjtLLksN4ojE4IUqBq8gi8bAVeRBaJ9TTfUd9WsLOpIeO8z00jFJlkqvbvTrawSq75XaONado7FL1wq94IgtKCm_3hE-QranltL1IpvrAjF053z0IK4YdIeE7J28J48D5HF1f0BoylOfkEl-vyccEH2CQd5795wCU3DCYVh4XbHNFLKKzWImd8TSDAQouevMWOaub5bMpTwVZFklxW1SL4ADY4kyNB01zvFM0LXmGnyW7YWQH1-UxT6gys3DfDn83pT3xQDfHKGABWm0mXFp6IySZ5L1iCa524cv2Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2df87e27ed4243619157a01ac5866b11&_e=8wTxoNHRmyIxgBd0SKERWUBZkd4mXKFoBTLIJ0LDJZO3sWeCxYbwPni_w-3OaLu4Pn-RgiJtZIwXR-aPXxpZd1Ng9vh4tlBPx4spzpX80ATg2E-JwjtLLksN4ojE4IUqBq8gi8bAVeRBaJ9TTfUd9WsLOpIeO8z00jFJlkqvbvTrawSq75XaONado7FL1wq94IgtKCm_3hE-QranltL1IpvrAjF053z0IK4YdIeE7J28J48D5HF1f0BoylOfkEl-1mSvow_fpMusThTb1slthSvA5D9w86lFZLw-s-nPV2Fon6jFSusRCUw6VZLa-yDbYGdWnEUDzliIaFiokBHCGFv3SHjWqj247BXdMhTDU0ALM1RWgKg23AkHP38HS-SRLyW-OrJkTvslewwHbYqX8Q%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they're doing to our kids?
body:
In case you missed our announcement on Tucker's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT04qVp_roCZ6Pe3iC99FwlthjIf7WWLRa2ynHum7b479jqJ6kMwcHy2qJe795YS8B6ENVvE51qEyvUiQav1N8vop5sxXITmqd-IIF_bSrXiJ5PvzKf_Oc83aYc_IbW4Q-zi60MZ6lVHOlN8t_AMDgUQ)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT156q3fw2SIHYkg3D04sxM8ehcdAc51yLHLApbvrJ1hIRd_qVqMNURqVt2PzkCmAjEjMr3fi3WTqTKmQtOLKcdXzKHw3emHmLA5UsGuWu56q-x_CSB6fwGp5op8AySltdKbUexRF2xWkoxBzbM34VOh) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT08Gba76RWltMnFyCT2J3k76LgYktnWrQdsAN3oQ_8DD2_ciA2JkAR0RcLwb1rkCBIwsLWx5D0tNzlo5QBD1fwTZiFjKRRE4V4a83u7tm77s9thIq0Rp7d108AJDUI9h8V4e4eiN6KZi8MXFO1L0RL7) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT2cw3AMIbYqMH04eseS6RdlDkbgoSE8a-Y5JOisjxygUmOHEyKo5sIm0sEJH1L3UeVVARRtvBV__ASPoKlB6dJ7p7MvYGOxHWXeBWBj4SKg71Xa1cGvHJyjqdUG9Pgmg4lRACd_59_gN0t245B75Fet)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT1uQxCm55qTDezKXRAPnA3-5PF5oWknZmqBT50PZh2NxerSk5rEws-SA-ImWcLyDUeneE9SJLLOZa8M-7a3s0USmXjMx6IZj9DqVWybrlMxkwTRPnAM5lIkT61-uP2YDpCQJsFzumLrrN4OOFAVfJbB) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT27tIe3lHO4MWosgMft0rPkGZ3LfN6IsVJZvDJq1LXFlwjPN9Pt46-5v9I4KQOvVj35AqwAPKzzceIQF0-QewjdXx-c1KzcFwhkAMoMFI3ZOwY3JD7z-rbvFLdVbPqPivCEeSTBfPOyrR8TCYt70gFk)

| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b5fd8621f724958a3c5804bfb4d0d8e&_e=UuHdPiNoiRbno5meHaBG82l4aJKDwnvNMnyACKpoLmz81p53_c1kKeEgvroeghdw6jfvtPP5wMYeHq-6kCElm6KwU4YzROd2yI0BYNruhAJQ0Zw6sr_wxu4kFwrufq5ISAe2nc2LIK6plqYUnDBWFQeuqaTPq1m_KIiKB3eqncp2UEyYuAcX4Su1BoxNUJZmQNpgqrPZ_i6IBZcAX7yQbArc_WFU61OaE7SGlZxdhT3zuuCZijmNAfMivJ_QaUxYQyCHt0Fne8oPHZYDnEXwtyI8osq1QWV6QSH31ijin8Jzlpl5PqLEzUTBjz3ib9Fo_D0s5ziFCesrazY67f9gBPQwHo3DVwyZIOSYm8k-F9vqRYglgeDSZYbPix1K0tBt)

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08a783133c184fdebb303ec6694467c0&_e=WZmYgQ2-mVQoNyAIHMknCfXb9Y1oAWcvPdBaHTYeb443SPeUx1BhCkcEYvvf6GaSs1EyvhHUOYQkl2S8AUrkEyrV6Sf3q9RLk-d_rNuxATsYz51ixvhfILLMtLLQWD6csrUK1CkNUFMWB3QL2_U-Ed5D8rZ4b0Ctm5Ml0zu_rZ38TDcK4Nb-3yzSw2R-HsSwl5hMcAcB5nf24SiDt_vTDq8DAPFpNQTraWGLLMq8QEDElv2WJ6Hmst5xXMbx8f6z_VO-eafV3EL54vd6lG8_meCp-G7I5Mx9SgGofgaWSmNNA7Ifm-Qe3dsfdn8VpDldQIiXNW7vYk9gtSe-nwzGGn7Bb_rci7OGZNYdPb7346o%3D)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

Each dollar counts. ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08a783133c184fdebb303ec6694467c0&_e=WZmYgQ2-mVQoNyAIHMknCfXb9Y1oAWcvPdBaHTYeb443SPeUx1BhCkcEYvvf6GaSs1EyvhHUOYQkl2S8AUrkEyrV6Sf3q9RLk-d_rNuxATsYz51ixvhfILLMtLLQWD6csrUK1CkNUFMWB3QL2_U-Ed5D8rZ4b0Ctm5Ml0zu_rZ38TDcK4Nb-3yzSw2R-HsSwl5hMcAcB5nf24SiDt_vTDoNoH0cPa2ueVwEi8pUFF2PK9E64jDG-eBEdCxJr9Ty1JoXSJJtwgvlUisu82mzWiHlaXPAH8cnAMiDXqqPql8HzKu9hAV5H7O8gsKyyTcS64b2Kgy3vJaWiMVxlHLio8AJ92ITlNFYNcaP1fIwWeLk%3D)

subject: Dollar to Plunge in April 2023 [Experts Warn]
body:
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.

** The United States Is About to Face Arguably...
The Greatest Dollar Collapse We've Ever Seen **
Hopefully, you've been preparing yourself because this problem is accelerating right before our very eyes...

The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.[1](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmj6gcvdpqit9clovf7a1c8m4tnevrcoghrq86f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs) They won't admit that **the U.S dollar is in a free fall**.
We recently have seen the first real indications that the **U.S. Dollar is in a real decline** ...
For over 10 years now the U.S Dollar and Treasury bonds have been seen as a hedge against volatility...
But with lower yields now for bonds[2](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zni79i5g646o10khc5nqtnljnh33fsmg57vap4do_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs) -- [investors are running back to gold and silver](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn9l59bakbrvfju60r0a19olvlhmo3q8b71oakrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs) and away from the U.S. dollar.
The dynasty of the U.S. dollar is coming to an end.
And when you have a Fed with a massive balance sheet that can and will continue to print money -- It's **only a matter of time before the dollar completely collapses.**
Billionaires have already been making major moves to protect themselves. Even China's Crypto billionaire is stockpiling Gold[3](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr4mg6ilf38bvcgpl7chdp5uti8aj8e9hpnq2nmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs).
But it's the **IRA and 401(k) savers who will be screwed** unless they [**make some major pivots now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5t4iq2rkqdgjte58aprknlqofnbn4hrcg5um88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs).
So it's incredibly important **RIGHT NOW to protect your family**.
**The warning signs are here ...**

**Inside you 'll discover a LEGAL IRS LOOPHOLE that may protect your IRA, 401(k), or pension savings. (Tax and Penalty Free)**
[Click here now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrncqee5ac1905o2obu35ontmu4t78a14nsjap1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs), because once this crisis hits, it'll already be too late.
Christopher Coyne
**P.S.**
Don't wait to protect your hard-earned savings. Top economists and billionaires are predicting that the **dollar could collapse by the end of April[4](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgjjte02sk3prokj8i5b8fdvcc5u4mif7203mlbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs)** \- [Get informed and prepare now before it's too late](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zil9t6849a1aqpbtm1klfgk1o8mkub4vobdso1q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slim2o36c1h2bs).

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: re: Walgreens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – it's Jacky Rosen. **I just sent a letter to the Walgreens CEO condemning the company's decision to stop selling mifepristone –** **an FDA-approved medication used for abortion and treating miscarriages. Here's why:**
Medication abortion is the most common abortion method in our country. It's safe. It's effective. And it's been widely used for the past 20 years.
And yet, _Walgreens made the decision to not sell mifepristone_ , which will affect access to reproductive care across the country. It's an outrageous decision based entirely on pressure from anti-choice politicians – not science.
**That's why I put together a rapid-response petition to send a loud and clear message that the majority of Americans won't stand for the GOP's draconian attacks on our reproductive freedom. body:

** The United States Is About to Face Arguably...
The Greatest Dollar Collapse We've Ever Seen **
Hopefully, you've been preparing yourself because this problem is accelerating right before our very eyes...

The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.[1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2eocn9pnv048f1jtfb6kkkvpqgiaev00uq8o80g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slimao72cth2bs) They won't admit that **the U.S dollar is in a free fall**.
We recently have seen the first real indications that the **U.S. Dollar is in a real decline** ...
For over 10 years now the U.S Dollar and Treasury bonds have been seen as a hedge against volatility...
But with lower yields now for bonds[2](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2r2dr8cp1f2jqmhmcsashsq23me64g67r95pl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slimao72cth2bs) -- [investors are running back to gold and silver](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztoubvg9l9vfmc47bmvj82f0bc1kejnp1gvtvc6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slimao72cth2bs) and away from the U.S. dollar.
The dynasty of the U.S. dollar is coming to an end.
And when you have a Fed with a massive balance sheet that can and will continue to print money -- It's **only a matter of time before the dollar completely collapses.**
Billionaires have already been making major moves to protect themselves. Even China's Crypto billionaire is stockpiling Gold[3](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk8c5e69dnq07anth0pv696adr9v1dli10h8tkb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slimao72cth2bs).
But it's the **IRA and 401(k) savers who will be screwed** unless they [**make some major pivots now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fna02591rdl1es0mqn88apbn1n6664sg8budr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0slimao72cth2bs).

Christopher Coyne

Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission. They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away. They lied about Ray Epps. If they were "insurrectionists," then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested? What else are they lying about? I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public. And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free. I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying. This is just the beginning. The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events. Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. ** Thank you, Kash Patel The Fight With Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. ** Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |
