name: 2024 alert || DASS
subject: Democracy is still on the ballot…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
In 2020, we saw Donald Trump divide Americans over the integrity of our elections, which led to the horrific attack on the Capitol.
In 2022, Trump continued his assault on our democracy by supporting extremist Republicans who vowed to overturn future election results.
And in 2024, Trump is still promising to run for president even if he’s indicted.
Make no mistake, folks: An indicted Trump running for office would wreak havoc on the political process and make 2020 look tame.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Join America’s education revolution! Betsy DeVos in Jackson.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132884?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The United States has been at the forefront of human scientific and technological progress. **From the advent of powered flight to the age of the iPhone, America has been home to the world’s great innovations. Most of the world’s top universities are American. American ingenuity planted the stars & stripes on the moon, and more recently flew an unmanned drone on Mars.

**Yet the United States has a school system that in many parts of the country struggles to teach tenth graders basic math and grammar.** Multiple school districts in Mississippi, for example, have been F rated for as long as anyone can remember.

**America ought to be able to do better than this. **

In order to give every American child, from every background, the chance of a good education, conservatives have long recognized that it is not enough to tinker with a top-down system. (You can read my analysis about this week’s half-baked attempts by the Senate at school funding reform [here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c1cb9013ab&e=5703353baa))

**What America's education system really needs is parent power. That means handing moms & dads control over their child’s share of education tax dollars.** That, coupled with a greater diversity of providers, would – conservatives have long suggested - create a system more responsive to the needs of each child.

**Despite campaigning for education freedom for decades, until this year, we conservatives had remarkably little to show for it – either here or across the country.** To be sure, Charter Schools are a big step in the right direction, but with a mere eight Charter Schools in the entire state of Mississippi, they have yet to have the impact some had hoped for.

However, things are starting to change. **An education revolution is gaining momentum across America – and Betsy DeVos, one of the leaders of this movement, is coming to Jackson to talk about it. **

Last year, West Virginia and Arizona each established a system of universal school choice. Every kid in those two states has, in effect, an Education Savings Account into which their share of tax dollars are paid. Their families are then free to spend those tax dollars educating their kid at pretty much any approved provider.

**This week the magnificent Sarah Huckabee Sanders, the newly elected Governor of Arkansas, signed legislation that will give every kid in her state the right to spend their education tax dollars in any school, public, private or home-school.** At the same time, Gov Huckabee Sanders, has guaranteed a minimum $50,000 salary for public school teachers in her state by 2025.
---
|
---
**_Education freedom hero Sarah Huckabee Sanders in Jackson_**
| **Why can we not do something similar here in Mississippi? **

Appointed Education Secretary by President Trump, Mrs. DeVos is one of the most knowledgeable champions for education freedom in America.

**_Please come and listen to Betsy DeVos talk about education freedom in America. Book your place at lunch with Mrs. DeVos today to ensure your place. _**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=05a69dc219&e=5703353baa)
---
Click on the image above to purchase your tickets!
| Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d112279b4b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

name: Tim Scott
subject: I need you to see this major announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Trust me, you're gonna want to see this!

| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423898:Jacr5PGNL:m:1:3331421248:1458495B8BC79018FF41C664F60E13F8:r "Generic Button")
---
It's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423898:Jacr5PGNL:m:1:3331421248:1458495B8BC79018FF41C664F60E13F8:r "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423897:Jacr5PGNL:m:1:3331421248:1458495B8BC79018FF41C664F60E13F8:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423897:Jacr5PGNL:m:1:3331421248:1458495B8BC79018FF41C664F60E13F8:r "Can I count on
you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423897:Jacr5PGNL:m:1:3331421248:1458495B8BC79018FF41C664F60E13F8:r "JOIN MY
TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I’m not easily insulted, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter, I can’t overstate the urgency of this situation. Marjorie Taylor Greene launched the first attack ads against me as the Democratic Leader in a dishonest smear to distort my record. [**I’m not easily insulted – but when extremists fan the flames of hostility, you have to believe I’m going to respond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60048678/395848577/1662333042?refcode=20230311_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzcyNTFlOS0zZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQoM1wKJOw83MPIKGrB7UGv2GRs7x8LzhYPt0DAG_Do=) [_**To counter these attacks and defend my Democrats, I've launched my own ads to set the record straight. Because, Peter, attack ads are only going to come at us more and more. Democrats must be prepared to respond quickly to get our message out there. So I've launched my first wave of ads as your Leader, and I’m hoping you’ll help me raise 500 gifts before midnight to fund them. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60048679/395848578/1662333042?refcode=20230311_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzcyNTFlOS0zZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQoM1wKJOw83MPIKGrB7UGv2GRs7x8LzhYPt0DAG_Do=) Peter, I’ll never back down from extreme MAGA Republicans who lie to the American people. Especially not one who has promoted violence and armed insurrection. This is just one of many reasons why we must take back the House. [**_Immediately._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60048680/395848582/1662333042?refcode=20230311_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzcyNTFlOS0zZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQoM1wKJOw83MPIKGrB7UGv2GRs7x8LzhYPt0DAG_Do=) But Peter, we can’t flip the House if dangerous lies in ads like this one go unanswered – so I can’t overstate the urgency of the next 10 hours. [_**I need 500 supporters to help me stand up to these shameful smears. So I’m personally asking you, Peter: Will you rush in $15 before midnight to help fund my critical response? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60048681/395848590/1662333042?refcode=20230311_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzcyNTFlOS0zZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQoM1wKJOw83MPIKGrB7UGv2GRs7x8LzhYPt0DAG_Do=) | | [**DONATE NOW: $15**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60048683/395848598/1662333042?refcode=20230311_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzcyNTFlOS0zZWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQoM1wKJOw83MPIKGrB7UGv2GRs7x8LzhYPt0DAG_Do=)

[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign our EMERGENCY petition to show President Biden we stand with him »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230311_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6719%2E878179%2EaB6uDx) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden?refcode=VPP_20230311_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6719%2E878179%2EaB6uDx) | [**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST REPUBLICANS’ BASELESS INVESTIGATION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230311_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6719%2E878179%2EaB6uDx)

Jim Jordan is DESPICABLE.

This investigation is baseless and a waste of time — but it’s already gaining MASSIVE support from Republicans everywhere.

**If we don’t act fast, they’ll end Joe Biden’s career and sweep Donald Trump back into the White House...**

[We need 50,000 signatures by tomorrow to show Jim Jordan Democrats EVERYWHERE stand with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230311_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=6719%2E878179%2EaB6uDx)

[ R.L. Stine, the author of the popular “Goosebumps” series, has recently spoken out against his publisher, Scholastic, for making changes to his books without his consent. Our teachers deserve better.
They are the backbone of our country. Every day they're doing an exceptional job in improving the lives of our kids.
But educators today are forced to deal with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, safety concerns, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.
The pandemic caused nearly 300,000 public school educators and staff to leave their jobs. Now, we are facing a shortage of around 200,000 public school teachers across the country.
It's time that we show our teachers the respect and appreciation they deserve. _**That means paying public school teachers a living wage.**_
But we want to hear directly from you: Do you agree with President Biden that public school teachers deserve a raise?
**[YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60030865/395797004/1818634985?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Teacherraisepoll_031123_RS_y2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkOWFkMTJmLTE5YzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJDrLNh4W3zsInrjqTaXGxTgZKWArUi21JEkTtzYJ0M=&emci=ebb9b60b-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dd9ad12f-19c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60030868/395797008/1818634985?refcode=em_UTC_PET_Teacherraisepoll_031123_RS_n2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkOWFkMTJmLTE5YzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJDrLNh4W3zsInrjqTaXGxTgZKWArUi21JEkTtzYJ0M=&emci=ebb9b60b-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dd9ad12f-19c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16951753)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Two years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Two years ago, we made a policy choice that lifted children all over the country out of poverty. There’s really no clearer example of our government’s power to help people.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1923%2E5257348%2EKGwBfX)
Derek,
Two years ago this month, we passed the _American Rescue Plan_ , our $1.9 trillion relief package to help defeat a deadly global pandemic and get Americans back to work and school.
As part of that ambitious plan, we expanded the Child Tax Credit, which cut child poverty _in half._
Think about that: Two years ago, we made a policy choice that lifted children all over the country out of poverty. There’s really no clearer example of our government’s power to help people.
But to do the opposite? Well, that’s a choice too...
**And that’s exactly the choice that the Republicans made. They chose to let the expanded Child Tax Credit expire — and millions of families suffered the consequences. Child poverty, hunger, and food insecurity skyrocketed immediately after this policy expired.**
**[We need to reinstate the expanded Child Tax Credit, Derek, and I’m ready to take on that fight in the Senate. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll sign on to show your support:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230311-arp-ctc.0wmtXi&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1923%2E5257348%2EKGwBfX)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230311-arp-ctc.0wmtXi&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1923%2E5257348%2EKGwBfX)
---
After we passed the _American Rescue Plan_ , Mitch McConnell bragged that “not a single member of my party voted for [it].”
Pretty strange coming from the “pro-family” party. Except completely on brand.
While the GOP’s obstruction is unlikely to end anytime soon, we can — and must — keep pushing for progress. You have my word that when I’m in the Senate, I will fight every day to finish the work we started by reinstating the Child Tax Credit and helping millions of families get the support they deserve.
Thank you for being a part of this fight.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=1923%2E5257348%2EKGwBfX)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=1923%2E5257348%2EKGwBfX)

**I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher.**
Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block.
Team, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, __we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel.__
**But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Jahana.** I know Jahana has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for CT-05, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way.

clean_body: | | Friend, it’s DCCC Chair Congresswoman Suzan DelBene. I wanted you to be the first to know that I just added Rep. Jahana Hayes to the DCCC’s list of 2024 Frontline Members – a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to taking back the House Majority next November. I’ve seen Jahana's leadership firsthand, so trust me when I say we need her voice in Congress, fighting everyday for the hard working families across CT-05. But with Jahana serving one of the most competitive districts in the country, keeping her in Congress is going to require the full strength of this grassroots team. = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: The stakes of taking back the House have never been higher. Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time in using their Majority to play political games, entertain partisan infighting, and target our most fundamental freedoms. They’ve made it clear that our healthcare, reproductive freedoms, and democracy itself are on the chopping block. Team, the stakes of this election are too high to sit on the sidelines. To build on our progress and deliver for the American people, we have to take back the Speaker’s Gavel. But to do so, we’ll have to protect each and every one of our Frontline Members, starting with Jahana. I know Jahana has what it takes to deliver another resounding victory for CT-05, but only if this grassroots team comes together in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Suzan DelBene Chair, DCCC | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. ---
| Peter,
---
| When I accepted the Republican nomination in 2016, I declared, "I am your voice."
---
| During my speech at CPAC, I added that _**" I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your RETRIBUTION."**_
---
| 2024 is the final battle for America.
---
| Either they win, or we win. And I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be OVER, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.
---
| _**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422776:6BjDUPG_N:m:1:3365131770:4B5F675FCC61986C05F649BFDBEDF25F:r "Please make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422776:6BjDUPG_N:m:1:3365131770:4B5F675FCC61986C05F649BFDBEDF25F:r)
---
| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.
---
| _**[So please, make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422776:6BjDUPG_N:m:1:3365131770:4B5F675FCC61986C05F649BFDBEDF25F:r "So please,
make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund â€“ for 1,300%
impact.")**_
---
| Thank you,

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18904?t=1001&akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress, but we’ve got just a
little bit left to go. If you could give just $20 right now to help us pay
it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the
Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18904?t=1002&akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18904?t=1004&akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230311-3044-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3044_346206_z-gpmw&akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3044%2E346206%2Ez-gpmw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend –

This is urgent! I'm reaching out to you personally because I need your help.

I built a group of 5,000 of our top supporters to participate in our critical focus group, **but I still need** _YOUR_**response.**[**Will you take my survey right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60034448/395810894/-1657212254?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2317-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZjRlNjEyLTFlYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gKzQoV_eZWIdTV77nm2jW2Cbo5DvjuAyauEh2U5l_8U=&emci=8b1221f0-12bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d9f4e612-1ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=23124236)
**Here's why this is so important:**

1\. We're two months into the new Congress, and the GOP is working to enact their dangerous, destructive agenda – **like cutting Social Security & Medicare and stripping away our fundamental rights.**

That’s why he’s placing an indefinite hold on all of Joe Biden’s DOD nominees in the U.S. Senate. \- Team Tuberville id:2023-03-06-13:17:51:453t | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | |

Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. body:
As violence keeps escalating under Israel’s extremist far-right government, I want the Palestinian people to know that no one can erase our existence. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvDwedyneJzDlNq5SWjZkSux0UrzUT3mGmNEf65y-uNWcoXRwZbtR2nN3aWxLfmjEI0LU4_34DWlw-tMr1BfnYSkwvdreEEPb0ORko-pG429kGJ38ZeqtnuKptvDD4e4LYDiC79Nj1Eluk2iLdw4pi5Jzh24Y-imyf8ypp7933U6W9B7UcpNbU4mGsrkXZ7fxvXsYgT9MbbzrT4UuYV3yMxpXJJRJplKY-7_R20ZKYiQk/3ue/R1Vzr0dIRz64-Gs7iSSykg/h0/dabUMbDEFlRTxqzeu-O8wcFfQiWCtr7SSWD3_7CRrbE)
---
Friend, Under Israel’s apartheid government, Palestinians are banned from flying the Palestinian flag. But I’m proudly flying the flag outside my office in Congress. As violence keeps escalating under Israel’s extremist far-right government, I want the Palestinian people to know that no one can erase our existence. For months, Israeli soldiers have invaded Palestinian villages nearly every day, critically injuring hundreds while shooting at ambulances to block people from receiving medical care. And in the last week, violent mobs of Israeli settlers (who live in Palestinian territories illegally) have attacked a number of Palestinian towns, even burning down homes with families inside. **Responding to recent attacks, a senior Israeli government official incited genocide against Palestinians, calling for the state of Israel to “wipe out” the Palestinian villages.** **Yet the bipartisan effort to shield Israel from accountability continues.** State governments and Congress have tried to punish boycotts of Israel and other tactics calling for Palestinian rights, in violation of our First Amendment rights to free speech and dissent. Yet the far-right Supreme Court recently refused to take up a case to overturn one of these unconstitutional laws. **Despite these efforts to silence us, I will not back down.** As the only Palestinian-American serving in the U.S. Congress, I won’t stand by silently as our country is complicit in Israel’s apartheid. We must end unconditional U.S. military support for Israel’s military now. We need to keep the pressure on until Palestinians’ humanity and equal rights are finally recognized. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:

Peter, I'm James Comer, the head of GOP investigations. I haven't sent many emails like this before so please hear me out.
Now that I'm leading the investigations in DC, my good name is being attacked every day by the White House and dark money groups.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422990:JTNIRPGCN:m:1:3361486117:1889604F9311EF2DC6B17EB8C2A40A9D:r)
---
I'm not kidding, there is a guy at the White House whose entire job is to attack me in the national press every day because I have the courage to shine a light on the failures of the Biden Administration.
[**I 'm working day and night to defend myself from these attacks, and I'm relying on patriots across the country to support my campaign so I can fight back against these attacks.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422990:JTNIRPGCN:m:1:3361486117:1889604F9311EF2DC6B17EB8C2A40A9D:r)
The Left has even launched a dark money group called the "Congressional Integrity Project" to undermine our work. They are determined to stop the truth about Joe and Hunter from seeing the light of day.
**[If you're as serious about exposing Biden as I am, I'm asking for your help with a contribution to my campaign.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422990:JTNIRPGCN:m:1:3361486117:1889604F9311EF2DC6B17EB8C2A40A9D:r)**
It's crucial that I'm able to fight back against these attacks, my integrity and credibility must be defended.
Thanks for everything you're doing in our movement, I really do appreciate it. Thank you,
| [ **DONATE** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62422990:JTNIRPGCN:m:1:3361486117:1889604F9311EF2DC6B17EB8C2A40A9D:r)

Now, it’s time to build on that momentum. I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to ensure that we are in the best position possible to win back our Majority and continue fighting for the hardworking folks of North Carolina's 13th district in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your unwavering support, Peter. Julie Merz Executive Director DCCC Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! >I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_e=txzE9lc6CsrwFHIPCpUaqmijrU38-_pqhjNGc0pCF7Lh7jWcAyRNU9gHKB1HnwfmDozqcsydRmCaBIr4z56Bwkm6E7AI2UGZP5dEN9q-w4dUBSf3tHinR4u-8sP7QSrr4DFL8N7g8zDUYmuLMtbBceQuXY2TxaR4IlvzPYZzCVop6bBMzhx4ODOZIr-69Cn65DpUKuyyaqBEdxHQHjS6Hgk8lAOkfLEJFYg7SfkY7M5kP8rEdlsPcZ-j7A0IUunmuvJDcZ_mwA0cLwkn03BOGIqVfYpS0ycybibsokpxhVj7AtXmU9XEh7Pdgno0U0miMb1zROCLn0koiTN_hDz0iAhlJsmjy4lo0nBmAbb-Fuq61eqF96HQrSGrk6fVhDDZlT0UU1atO-uzsOt3xakU1A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_e=txzE9lc6CsrwFHIPCpUaqmijrU38-_pqhjNGc0pCF7Lh7jWcAyRNU9gHKB1HnwfmDozqcsydRmCaBIr4z56Bwkm6E7AI2UGZP5dEN9q-w4dUBSf3tHinR4u-8sP7QSrr4DFL8N7g8zDUYmuLMtbBceQuXY2TxaR4IlvzPYZzCVop6bBMzhx4ODOZIr-69Cn65DpUKuyyaqBEdxHQHjS6Hgk8lAOkfLEJFYg7SfkY7M5kP8rEdlsPcZ-j7A0IUunmfPylLqZpdgDp7jlxCSDreg9Arl1Z75BK_l4R0FkUoYYPZNe2NADHeoCkqZQSW24E8tc8jZbsSGbm14mZLEZGVBJ6BE2-ljiqmSOXdJZ83nA7fjRMDmajf77tohYFn_4I9TdGr1kLnbBUbXD1de3b2w%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_e=txzE9lc6CsrwFHIPCpUaqmijrU38-_pqhjNGc0pCF7Lh7jWcAyRNU9gHKB1HnwfmDozqcsydRmCaBIr4z56Bwkm6E7AI2UGZP5dEN9q-w4dUBSf3tHinR4u-8sP7QSrr4DFL8N7g8zDUYmuLMtbBceQuXY2TxaR4IlvzPYZzCVop6bBMzhx4ODOZIr-69Cn65DpUKuyyaqBEdxHQHjS6Hgk8lAOkfLEJFYg7SfkY7M5kP8rEdlsPcZ-j7A0IUunmbArF9HEv9fXvF_ISVZlRnuErp0AnskznvkHtBZmgy26sAsIcMvasn9KdnJnZfIAEQNee_VVg2t_w2wZit6uRMCvujgkUWdyIlMqL7KqD_WuztbQCbKhobBFYVhb-TYfJivSxISF3fKm718VZLzE6Cw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_t=GwDj3uuA7BkRzSe6bQLv-evTaIC3IfiXsK5rr8H97ZV1rkOviEE4YXSRXLS1wOoMgQmi0OjC-ZehE3bFoos0pBgRQ-gAKPZPPG3GqGNkL9YGAwuBbr3zZxuYQLtcYubs4PmDKzOq9VnKbPWEfdrBnMJ-Zq1ZAhSJL3tpYeTw3jk%3D) [**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_e=zjeyB4KNl2ohWgGW9OOJrYxMdCEESovs5nmeuNyJQbEKMa039rfradOGUds5EZwUlgSHZVOrPHXQUsLLeNwz8yQedP-2pwcPm510bj0lJsQ0n7QP-jG30V-qw6aA409nYU_mlGy9ngZQlExs_w9qU5oUOk5Di0yLNftP3LMY3jotXYMVHuJKpYIGdEkfFrx7_DnEJppt1JCQY5RJn55idn49tB0HOkwcsONtGeoy4LOQooHw-SvJG_9rInVDjxZsa_69Wix-h9p3gEMAq-FiyQ%3D%3D) | [Manage Data Preferences](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35c1f5d6c50742189f28eff8972949ca&_e=txzE9lc6CsrwFHIPCpUaquQDAjBQg7uaVz-_XXc4F2VjNRcvsHVMyWwXD2-Qt2WcdmzdzSBPq7466BNmNP3ZYK6LoBFQiaFNh4E2uoc-sKgYLsxaXDZBRKzSq0k4lQ7Cf8zOXI8EznVxdi4nWPxwGi_PzGGBApwYYpqVc0dLB6wDTeVJtS5_GsSgZEV2y8r6Vr3if2EKIvQ_3LfrT3CKWcExzNdEt3XG1cI0YzyMCqk%3D)

name: National Rifle Association
subject: We need to address the elephant in the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Self-defense isn't just a right. It's the most important right. | Self-defense is our most important right. In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)

Peter,

Self-defense is our most important right.

In recent years, instances of law-abiding Americans being punished for protecting themselves have become alarmingly common. Far too often, responsible gun owners are being **reprimanded, chastised, or even imprisoned** for using their legal firearms to defend themselves.

That's insane, and we need to put an end to it. _No one is more committed to protecting the American people's Constitutionally guaranteed right to self-defense than the NRA._
**[PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**
**The right to self-defense is the cornerstone of all freedoms. Without it, we cannot be free.** That's why, given the recent deranged attacks on our right to protect ourselves, the NRA's work has never been more important.

We recently set a new fundraising goal to preserve **your right to self-defense** , and we need your immediate support to reach it. _**Peter, can you step up?**_

**[Contribute any amount TODAY to help the NRA CRUSH its Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**
**SUPPORTER: Peter
DONATION STATUS: Awaiting contribution
PURPOSE: PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**

Cases of Americans being taken to court for defending themselves have been making headlines all over the country. Meanwhile, violent crime has been rampant, threatening law-abiding citizens' livelihoods everywhere. _This cannot continue to happen._

The NRA will ALWAYS work to protect your right to self-defense. _We'll fight back against ANY action taken by activist politicians that restricts your liberty or threatens your freedom, and crushing this Self-Defense Preservation Fundraising Goal will be a huge step in the right direction._

**[Please donate to the NRA TODAY so we can continue to work to protect your right to self-defense.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423375:Jhs3RPGiN:m:1:3331421248:C5B1CE7054AC6B21BD796060357084B3:r)**

name: Joni Ernst
subject: I won’t be silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our military is being politicized to help Liberals stay in power.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04bd3d5a4c1e4e61bf2c28460144e36f&_e=N7avoIqkn-JWeSnJfHCejQTuxNn2WIxU8Bc1F7zGpE2IKWnAuFi-H7DAzqOJ88jTqa-NAXIhDEwQq89XqAtJ-vauzqrQ0tt89KQYbCSSsVmzwAtxv6GCnY9mPy_hRv-MOGHyxoxavTnZ8TePh7iquxkUoml3_Ru6374Uycuh4KAANCqYEVU0vFiu6745qq9FyAV2VQXb-7n5id4uSfO3lT25f6tSjcuWrJMwnie1HZ5wgJSsbKicXqwuUefLUXH_WqTMGneLc-dLinmFZ0Ni9m5dXXo-l3j5NfIaqlfx7xembn8vbRKM6C-psOgvv43n6muy3S6kGKE1Zw6dzRoQ68HCCxyA1oYjBQ1ZPwjCH4tAcYjsMUVotuKN8aKkf-kldCa412Q4TWiri3XqHm_9JKzG9PSCMw5GDLhh8ugUfcJfJ273C3kSwNHd1kiGJDfrV_gK1xYqXwrdAFIb4YCNI6HqJXar9frgzxjgCHQ-uUI%3D)
---
| | Peter, it’s Joni – I can’t remain quiet about this ANY LONGER.
---
Serving my country in uniform was an honor and the privilege of a lifetime. The sacrifice men and women make every day during their service should be respected by Americans, not weaponized against them for power.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04bd3d5a4c1e4e61bf2c28460144e36f&_e=N7avoIqkn-JWeSnJfHCejQTuxNn2WIxU8Bc1F7zGpE2IKWnAuFi-H7DAzqOJ88jTqa-NAXIhDEwQq89XqAtJ-vauzqrQ0tt89KQYbCSSsVmzwAtxv6GCnY9mPy_hRv-MOGHyxoxavTnZ8TePh7iquxkUoml3_Ru6374Uycuh4KAANCqYEVU0vFiu6745qq9FyAV2VQXb-7n5id4uSfO3lT25f6tSjcuWrJMwnie1HZ5wgJSsbKicXqwuUefLUXH_WqTMGneLc-dLinmFZ0Ni9m5dXXo-l3j5NfIaqlfx7xembn8vbRKM6C-psOgvv43n6muy3S6kGKE1Zw6dzRoQ6_CcV3m6d5fVXGSLEpqA5PGNvMID-yXTvi--4GZRXS_7YrS-DKZ1-OgCGkmbpgX0rHbS6Kzj0NsVi_dsfvEjqJ7LotZYJnvQPEsPgls8pjujZGa5ioTnJAgCwPn6weYLeZxiI7f0rdrnejEBrItN00s%3D)
---
| | GOP Rep. Anna Paulina Luna was the latest lawmaker in a long list of victims to have their Air Force military records leaked to a Democrat opposition firm — **just because there is an (R) next to her name** ... As a veteran myself, who served with some of the most honorable men and women I’ve ever met, I’m **DISGUSTED** by this breach of privacy and accountability. _Our military is being POLITICIZED to help Liberals stay in power._ The political weaponization of our military is just one of the many “accomplishments” of the Far Left. Make no mistake, Republicans must demand answers and put a stop to these horrible incidents from happening. **STAND WITH THE NRSC: DEMAND AN INVESTIGATION**
---
[**Add Your Name to The Official Petition**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04bd3d5a4c1e4e61bf2c28460144e36f&_e=N7avoIqkn-JWeSnJfHCejQTuxNn2WIxU8Bc1F7zGpE2IKWnAuFi-H7DAzqOJ88jTqa-NAXIhDEwQq89XqAtJ-vauzqrQ0tt89KQYbCSSsVmzwAtxv6GCnY9mPy_hRv-MOGHyxoxavTnZ8TePh7iquxkUoml3_Ru6374Uycuh4KAANCqYEVU0vFiu6745qq9FyAV2VQXb-7n5id4uSfO3lT25f6tSjcuWrJMwnie1HZ5wgJSsbKicXqwuUefLUXH_WqTMGneLc-dLinmFZ0Ni9m5dXXo-l3j5NfIaqlfx7xembn8vbRKM6C-psOgvv43n6muy3S6kGKE1Zw6dzRoQ63UVk1JnBev3Rc_pGvI1rgdjj-7vWAq2jJ0v8k9YGgikgdDdITqCztBXHci7c9HuILYSkUWEjLjOVDuadV6Q7VipLoqlcXlys8MjYAOB8QjdTR08HmBlqryQE3VZo6nz0tszKxfHxoI9K9HOeU9CXfU%3D)
---
| | **Only a few months ago, a Conservative candidate running for Congress had her private military records leaked by the Democrat opponent to somehow ‘expose’ her combat record.**** ** **Instead, it revealed her sexual assault by an Iraqi soldier while serving in Baghdad during the Iraq War – forcing her to relive that traumatic experience in public**
---
| | The Left claims to be the party of “justice,” yet their radical mob attacks any values that harm their image, as they turn people of all stripes and creeds against one another to protect their own self-interests. If you’re done playing games with career D.C. insiders who will do anything they can to keep America divided, **join Senate Republicans in publicly demanding an investigation into this criminal activity.**
---
[**Demand an Investigation – Add Your Name Here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=04bd3d5a4c1e4e61bf2c28460144e36f&_e=N7avoIqkn-JWeSnJfHCejQTuxNn2WIxU8Bc1F7zGpE2IKWnAuFi-H7DAzqOJ88jTqa-NAXIhDEwQq89XqAtJ-vauzqrQ0tt89KQYbCSSsVmzwAtxv6GCnY9mPy_hRv-MOGHyxoxavTnZ8TePh7iquxkUoml3_Ru6374Uycuh4KAANCqYEVU0vFiu6745qq9FyAV2VQXb-7n5id4uSfO3lT25f6tSjcuWrJMwnie1HZ5wgJSsbKicXqwuUefLUXH_WqTMGneLc-dLinmFZ0Ni9m5dXXo-l3j5NfIaqlfx7xembn8vbRKM6C-psOgvv43n6muy3S6kGKE1Zw6dzRoQ62thapX-VcnvfdYO0R_joQDI5UQYj0TBdc0MmAFp5JKfaKSQWu5nkurTkLNPxvCmqN3sx8MoYwwqPwJ3J0aHMzv80pH1Z7kpPDnPnkDRPHfqCy4syTQYo9DuJuU9ui9WMcYm1VqepfHTFI2ArxafKpA%3D)

With you behind us in the Senate, I know we’ll put a stop to these shameful acts and restore the good name of our men and women in uniform. Sincerely,

clean_body: Our military is being politicized to help Liberals stay in power.| | | | | Peter, it’s Joni – I can’t remain quiet about this ANY LONGER. Serving my country in uniform was an honor and the privilege of a lifetime. The sacrifice men and women make every day during their service should be respected by Americans, not weaponized against them for power. | | GOP Rep. Anna Paulina Luna was the latest lawmaker in a long list of victims to have their Air Force military records leaked to a Democrat opposition firm — just because there is an (R) next to her name ... As a veteran myself, who served with some of the most honorable men and women I’ve ever met, I’m DISGUSTED by this breach of privacy and accountability. Our military is being POLITICIZED to help Liberals stay in power. The political weaponization of our military is just one of the many “accomplishments” of the Far Left. Make no mistake, Republicans must demand answers and put a stop to these horrible incidents from happening. STAND WITH THE NRSC: DEMAND AN INVESTIGATION | | Only a few months ago, a Conservative candidate running for Congress had her private military records leaked by the Democrat opponent to somehow ‘expose’ her combat record. Instead, it revealed her sexual assault by an Iraqi soldier while serving in Baghdad during the Iraq War – forcing her to relive that traumatic experience in public | | The Left claims to be the party of “justice,” yet their radical mob attacks any values that harm their image, as they turn people of all stripes and creeds against one another to protect their own self-interests. If you’re done playing games with career D.C. insiders who will do anything they can to keep America divided, join Senate Republicans in publicly demanding an investigation into this criminal activity. With you behind us in the Senate, I know we’ll put a stop to these shameful acts and restore the good name of our men and women in uniform. | Peter,

Republicans have made it clear that they don’t care about reproductive rights.

Since the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ , legislatures across the country have moved to further restrict reproductive rights — _**from restricting access to birth control to even criminalizing abortion in some cases.**_

I ran for office to carry on the work I’ve pursued in my time as a public servant: to represent underrepresented communities. That includes improving access to abortion and closing the healthcare coverage gap, which disproportionately impacts Black and Brown communities.

Now here's the deal: We're 35% of the way through March, but just 18% of the way to our fundraising goal. That's not great. What is great is that there's still time to turn it around, and we're counting on a big day to make that happen. 227 grassroots donations today will help us close the gap — can Ilhan count on you to add one? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = No corporate PACs. No billionaires waiting in the wings. The only way we fund this movement is together — and we wouldn't have it any other way. As always, thank you for being such an important part of our team. In solidarity, Team Ilhan = Ilhan for Congress or ILHAN PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States | mailto:info@ilhanomar.com | | Paid for by Ilhan for Congress

clean_body: Before we send out our next shipment, we wanted to give you a chance to claim yours before it’s too late | | | | | When we re-launched our membership cards, we had no idea they would be so popular! So before we send out our next shipment, we wanted to give you a chance to claim yours before it’s too late! ** Right now is the BEST time to claim your official 2023 DLCC membership card. Here’s why: We have no off years at the DLCC – with the Virginia House and Senate in play this fall and Republicans dumping six figures into critical special elections, it’s crucial that we have grassroots members behind us! And President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden know that electing Democrats up and down the ballot is the key to defending democracy and building back a better America.**But, we need help from our supporters to keep up with massive Republican efforts to crush state Democrats. As an official member of our team, you’ll help us win these competitive elections, support our caucuses year-round, and spread Democratic power in our target states! That’s why we’re counting on you. It’s never too early to take a stand against Republican extremism and accelerate our progress in the states! name: Team Joe
subject: Peter, take a look at whatwe’ve accomplished →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
President Biden, Vice President Harris, Democrats across the nation, and your steadfast support helped make the American Rescue Plan a reality -- and it’s delivering for the American people. | | |
---
**As our nation marks two years since Democrats passed the _American Rescue Plan_ , we wanted to take a moment to report back on the incredible progress that we’ve accomplished together.** President Biden and Democrats are rebuilding the middle class, the backbone of America, Peter. The _American Rescue Plan_ helped power our economic recovery, resulting in more jobs created in the last two years than under any presidential administration's first four-year term. **Take a moment to read about how much of an impact this legislation has had -- and how it has helped build a better America.**

* * *
**A HISTORIC ECONOMIC RECOVERY** Peter, when we last updated you on the progress of the _American Rescue Plan_ , the economy had produced 7.4 million new jobs -- the largest number of jobs created in a single year in American history. Well, two years out, we’re continuing to break records. The economy has created over 12 million jobs in just two years under the leadership of President Biden and Vice President Harris. On top of that, the unemployment rate remains at historic lows and we’ve seen a record 10.5 million new small business applications. This is the kind of leadership and progress that Democrats are delivering. **Want to share the good news with your friends and family and remind them just how historic this presidency has been? **LOWER HEALTH CARE COSTS AND A HISTORIC VACCINATION CAMPAIGN**
The _American Rescue Plan_ lowered health care premiums and increased eligibility to millions of lower- and middle-class families. As a result, over 13 million Americans saved an average of $800 a year on their health premiums -- leading to the most Americans in history having health insurance.
That’s not all, Peter. Thanks to the vaccination efforts supported by the _American Rescue Plan_ , today, over 230 million Americans are fully vaccinated, up from 3.5 million when President Biden took office.

* * *
**PROTECTING YOUR PENSION**
Ensuring that workers and their families enjoy the retirement security they earned through a lifetime of work has been a central part of President Biden’s economic plan. The _American Rescue Plan_ provided security for more than 200 distressed multiemployer pension plans, helping to ensure 2 to 3 million workers’ pension plans remain solvent and pay full benefits through at least 2051. That’s huge, Peter!

clean_body: President Biden, Vice President Harris, Democrats across the nation, and your steadfast support helped make the American Rescue Plan a reality -- and it’s delivering for the American people. | | | As our nation marks two years since Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan , we wanted to take a moment to report back on the incredible progress that we’ve accomplished together. President Biden and Democrats are rebuilding the middle class, the backbone of America, Peter. The American Rescue Plan helped power our economic recovery, resulting in more jobs created in the last two years than under any presidential administration's first four-year term. Take a moment to read about how much of an impact this legislation has had -- and how it has helped build a better America. A HISTORIC ECONOMIC RECOVERY Peter, when we last updated you on the progress of the American Rescue Plan , the economy had produced 7.4 million new jobs -- the largest number of jobs created in a single year in American history. Well, two years out, we’re continuing to break records. The economy has created over 12 million jobs in just two years under the leadership of President Biden and Vice President Harris. On top of that, the unemployment rate remains at historic lows and we’ve seen a record 10.5 million new small business applications. This is the kind of leadership and progress that Democrats are delivering. Want to share the good news with your friends and family and remind them just how historic this presidency has been? We’ve got you covered! Share this post to spread the word! | | | LOWER HEALTH CARE COSTS AND A HISTORIC VACCINATION CAMPAIGN The American Rescue Plan lowered health care premiums and increased eligibility to millions of lower- and middle-class families. As a result, over 13 million Americans saved an average of $800 a year on their health premiums -- leading to the most Americans in history having health insurance. That’s not all, Peter. Thanks to the vaccination efforts supported by the American Rescue Plan , today, over 230 million Americans are fully vaccinated, up from 3.5 million when President Biden took office. Do you or somebody you know need to receive a booster? Head over to to find your nearest COVID-19 vaccine provider to get your next dose and protect yourself and your loved ones. PROTECTING YOUR PENSION Ensuring that workers and their families enjoy the retirement security they earned through a lifetime of work has been a central part of President Biden’s economic plan. The American Rescue Plan provided security for more than 200 distressed multiemployer pension plans, helping to ensure 2 to 3 million workers’ pension plans remain solvent and pay full benefits through at least 2051. That’s huge, Peter! PETER'S ROLE IN BUILDING A BETTER AMERICA The American Rescue Plan passed without a single Republican vote. Not one. Thankfully, President Biden and Democrats in Congress ensured this legislation passed to get our country back on track. To help our party continue electing Democrats committed to delivering for the American people, we rely on grassroots supporters like you. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for your hard work and support. We’ll see you next week. Team Joe | ---|--- | |

I rely on donors like you to fuel our campaign. Your early donation allows me to spend more time focused on the issues facing our community. [Click here to donate today](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=004a070e98&e=292fde286a).

Kevin Mullin

Don’t miss your chance to make your voice heard! >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60039911/395832237/-609702315?refcode=ea.0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGYxZTMwMjYtMmVjMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hcfMQoEkxuQIOG7Wfs1TFYBSoYv31gzFafwwMQjPijQ=&emci=1e3b8b53-90be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782) | **[JOIN FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60039912/395832238/-609702315?refcode=ea.0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGYxZTMwMjYtMmVjMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hcfMQoEkxuQIOG7Wfs1TFYBSoYv31gzFafwwMQjPijQ=&emci=1e3b8b53-90be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0f1e3026-2ec0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782)**

Brandon is a firm believer in transparency and direct communication with voters and supporters. That’s why there’s nothing more important to him than to hear from you directly, Peter.
Brandon has never stopped advocating for Mississippi's working people and families — from fighting for Medicaid extension and good-paying jobs to holding special interests accountable and bringing high-speed internet to our most remote areas.
But there are plenty of issues out there that still need more attention, and that’s why Brandon wants to know which of them are most important to you.

body:
|

| **It 's official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](http://links.freeamericansforever.com/u/click?_t=def7bfae8aeb4bc7978e654943fded95&_m=c90d6c17318440fab9b4f6eb5e6dbfb2&_e=xAqkZQsJ3cShGYKva1BYWGbukfoUH8etnTQt2suKkejebP7clStYVoE5gBtVKObeiblnvSS21Ll_2O4gwk8QpCxAVNFQefJnUkG6ceP6a-L_JFUoMtn4fX5ozxv7sGgpR9rc7FDCIs8CTZYtUKC-i93b7CLKO6llp6_lbTyYCUG1u50Dim3-LM4kuo08tp2q5BcLJNFfNv1__O_k-_0iLSFF8xQqeh7e0zdOoLY9LSYqqshnCmpPrn1OiyWP2vBo4yO_iv5skaxyZvnFUESNqh9KzNp6H6IPpvQqMAkgqJ2mtjEtg59OLqFQnXk-x9DUBqXtyV3SqSbupmUJ40v9zqbiD2uV0TSwocEAqtTXGWAzwxetyOXb59AP_r_JiVJ1rM1yu58yL4oGruYTlpl6sGva1fqxjHMRuwe7qh3io64%3D "This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. Whether you live in DC or not, this development impacts ALL AMERICANS - so we need to hear from you right here and right now:
**PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY: Should illegal immigrants and foreign agents be allowed to vote in U.S. elections?**** **

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE HERE](http://links.freeamericansforever.com/u/click?_t=def7bfae8aeb4bc7978e654943fded95&_m=c90d6c17318440fab9b4f6eb5e6dbfb2&_e=xAqkZQsJ3cShGYKva1BYWGbukfoUH8etnTQt2suKkejebP7clStYVoE5gBtVKObeiblnvSS21Ll_2O4gwk8QpCxAVNFQefJnUkG6ceP6a-L_JFUoMtn4fX5ozxv7sGgpR9rc7FDCIs8CTZYtUKC-i93b7CLKO6llp6_lbTyYCUG1u50Dim3-LM4kuo08tp2q5BcLJNFfNv1__O_k-_0iLSFF8xQqeh7e0zdOoLY9LSYqqshnCmpPrn1OiyWP2vBo4yO_iv5skaxyZvnFUESNqhv24Txd-0cCn7bvB_AWWjvouJ_aslFrG2QqOEjebkf0UicJl5kBjjP79uI5dnYUrSdQTCVhB0qrEch56WWnikhXai3jV8HxThRkWBcfBxeKCwAGiIbCIEdblu2Ru1-ww6cvu9eDENTvPmD6qDVow6U%3D "button")
---

We can't believe this is happening in America.

These Radical Democrats are exploiting every ounce of power to plunge our country into chaos and greenlight their anti-American agenda. _Just imagine the ambassador of Communist China casting a ballot to choose _our_ elected representatives! _

If this was happening in your city, what would you do?

This is your chance to help shape the future of election integrity in America. _**[Submit your response to our official poll- your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team.](http://links.freeamericansforever.com/u/click?_t=def7bfae8aeb4bc7978e654943fded95&_m=c90d6c17318440fab9b4f6eb5e6dbfb2&_e=xAqkZQsJ3cShGYKva1BYWGbukfoUH8etnTQt2suKkejebP7clStYVoE5gBtVKObeiblnvSS21Ll_2O4gwk8QpCxAVNFQefJnUkG6ceP6a-L_JFUoMtn4fX5ozxv7sGgpR9rc7FDCIs8CTZYtUKC-i93b7CLKO6llp6_lbTyYCUG1u50Dim3-LM4kuo08tp2q5BcLJNFfNv1__O_k-_0iLSFF8xQqeh7e0zdOoLY9LSYqqshnCmpPrn1OiyWP2vBo4yO_iv5skaxyZvnFUESNqsC-g25QNn1y8FiTm_st3S49-JjPcl7TX6CJAmj8Q74-JbDF7eHCuibWJbaPNRPjsO84wGbNv9exso8ewtWbsqWAF2DyGDtR4MKYrwBqNYgJnLuJ8QGWsbxl8qYqBkt8PGSRfl9FkaJrdkwBoOumuWY%3D "Submit your response to our official poll – your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team. ")**_

Thanks for all you've done for your country.

Onward,

House Republicans

name: R.I.N.O. Projects
subject: We can Do Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY R.I
body:
Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Headline") Peter: Congress has been in session for less than two months, and we already have Republicans caving into the left. With our razor thin margin in Congress, we don't need to be responsible for helping Joe Biden's radical progressive agenda succeed. The Democrats have been more than capable at ruining our country without help from the GOP. But Mitch McConnell has been busy standing with Joe Biden at press conferences lauding spending bills and then seen attacking Rick Scott over his proposal to reduce the size of our Federal Government. **Wait, isn 't that what Republicans have pledged to do?** You see, when you've got the Mitch McConnell types in the Senate and then the Ken Buck types in the House, we're destined to fail and that's not an outcome I'm willing to accept. **[Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more conservatives to reverse the damage we've experienced from Biden and the Democrats?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more
conservatives to reverse the damage we’ve experienced from Biden and the Democrats?")** When the Democrats controlled both Houses of Congress, they rammed every progressive bill through without consulting the GOP. In fact, they threw at least two GOP Members of Congress off Committees for the crime of speaking their minds. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Headline")So, when it's good enough for Democrats to punish Republicans for their rights to Freedom of Speech, why isn't it good enough for Republicans to punish a Democrat who has made numerous anti-American statements that included support for terrorism? **Individuals like Ken Buck clearly don 't have their priorities straight and that's why we need to remove RINOs like him from Congress and any other GOP member who don't put the principles of national security and our Constitution above their needs for fame or electoral outcomes!** It's bad enough that we've had Republicans voting in favor of Biden's spending bills, failing to block progressive appointees to his Administration and the bench, supporting Pelosi's J6 witch hunt and the two illegal impeachments of President Trump, all of which was used to suppress votes for the GOP in the 2022 Election, but we're not going to let it happen in 2024. **[Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for Democrats in 2024.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for
Democrats in 2024.")** During the 118th Congress, we're going to have plenty of opportunities to see those who campaigned on a conservative message, but failed when it counted, as well as those who are delivering on their promises for a conservative change. **It 's no time for us to be silent.** We need to make our voices heard and hold Republicans accountable to their commitment to reduce taxes, shrink government, reign in out-of-control regulations, appointing judges who adhere to the Constitution and ensure our families are safeguarded by local police and a strong military. One of the reasons the Red Wave didn't happen in 2022 was a result of RINOs like Mitch McConnell who worked against conservative candidates, or when our GOP candidates embraced the Pelosi witch hunts instead of our conservative principles. **[Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!")** For Conservative Values, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "Autry Pruitt") Autry Pruitt
Conservative Author and Pundit | | [DEFEAT THE RINOS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62423899:6mqcjfGNK:m:1:3331421248:DCE5417E10DFF2BF374CD9C9B7C8B4B8:r "DEFEAT THE RINOS")
---

Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained T-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state across the country.**
[**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60057981/395864655/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3977-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjg2YjBjNC01OGMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7fwMdwpRwlw8LJ6hwy-0SqTZS3H5FDfiRaiKP-c0vA=)

You don’t need 10 fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,
Jon

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60057987/395864661/1575385346?refcode=jtk3977-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjg2YjBjNC01OGMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7fwMdwpRwlw8LJ6hwy-0SqTZS3H5FDfiRaiKP-c0vA=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60057988/395864662/1575385346?refcode=jtk3977-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjg2YjBjNC01OGMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7fwMdwpRwlw8LJ6hwy-0SqTZS3H5FDfiRaiKP-c0vA=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek: When I was growing up, I never could have imagined that I'd run for elected office one day – let alone become the first computer programmer and the first former synagogue president ever elected to the Senate.
As the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, I was surrounded by loved ones who taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I've carried these with me my entire life.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230311-1?refcode=em20230311-1-8284&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)
I carried those values with me when I was working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230311-1?refcode=em20230311-1-8284&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)
I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue, **and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds – becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230311-1?refcode=em20230311-1-8284&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)
To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans.
**But right now, experts at The Washington Post are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and FiveThirtyEight says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.**
The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. **[So please, Derek, will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and John Fetterman's today to help me defend my seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230311-1?refcode=em20230311-1-8284&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230311-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230311-8284&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)**
Thank you for taking the time to read my story – and for standing with me in the fight ahead.
Jacky Rosen

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230311-8284-footer&t=1&refcode2=8284_434096_zQq-yf&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8284%2E434096%2EzQq-yf)

| | Peter – "Resort fees" tacked on to hotel bills. "Service fees" on concert tickets. Even fees for parents and children to sit together on airplanes. Billion-dollar corporations are raking in record profits – and nickel and diming working folks like never before. **These junk fees are just legalized extortion, Peter, and they're exactly the kind of thing I came to Congress to stop.** **[I'm fighting for an immediate end to these kinds of surprise charges, especially when Oregon families are struggling more than ever. Chip in $3 to keep building our bold, pro-consumer movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60040930/395836083/-1599294071?refcode=2023-03-11-junkfees&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bbbd8784-30c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJkODc4NC0zMGMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq4hDfD4OavT-sRkzRSr5WVz23HeaM-npQd9X1bu5VI=)** It's really plain and simple: you should know what you're getting and how much it costs before you buy it. But**believe it or not, a lot of members of Congress are determined to _protect_ those junk fees**. In fact, they're choosing their corporate donors over working families and fighting every piece of pro-consumer legislation they see. Those corporations will spend millions in the coming months to try to get more of their buddies into office, and they're targeting this seat. **[We beat them last time by standing up to corporate power with grassroots power. Please pitch in $3 to show them our grassroots power.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60040931/395836084/-1599294071?refcode=2023-03-11-junkfees&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bbbd8784-30c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJkODc4NC0zMGMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq4hDfD4OavT-sRkzRSr5WVz23HeaM-npQd9X1bu5VI=)** clean_body: | | | | Peter – "Resort fees" tacked on to hotel bills. "Service fees" on concert tickets. Even fees for parents and children to sit together on airplanes. Billion-dollar corporations are raking in record profits – and nickel and diming working folks like never before. These junk fees are just legalized extortion, Peter, and they're exactly the kind of thing I came to Congress to stop. = It's really plain and simple: you should know what you're getting and how much it costs before you buy it. Butbelieve it or not, a lot of members of Congress are determined to protect those junk fees. In fact, they're choosing their corporate donors over working families and fighting every piece of pro-consumer legislation they see. Those corporations will spend millions in the coming months to try to get more of their buddies into office, and they're targeting this seat. = More soon, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Beshear
subject: Every Kentuckian deserves access to affordable health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
If you believe that health care is a human right, add your name and stand with Andy. Hey Peter,

For so many families, one of their biggest fears is receiving a bill for medical expenses and being forced into bankruptcy because of the high costs.

Andy believes that every Kentuckian deserves access to quality, affordable health care. And he believes pharmaceutical companies shouldn't be allowed to prey on poor and working-class Kentuckians to boost profits.

But the reality is, too many families in Kentucky worry about losing their livelihood to pay for the medical care they need. It's past time we change that.

[**Do you agree that every Kentuckian should have access to affordable health care? Add your name to join Andy in this important fight →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60042258/395841012/-176169563?ms=em23_230311_health_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em23_230311_health_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em23_230311_health_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230311_health_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=llJzDkqjPICfaqH0cFqAC91A1I6jQto3myq3o2YU0ivwPEuWQzJlMCeKzqmlEIKpZGgu/MkClJu3p3RzdS8gpnCCkw73oDnK3bICUvvMWkglPY8p2WOPI4B5cZrziXED2y8p9zlGVzOdS9QGm+k2aZC2TJ2ZLE8EUo969RjCOOTRiZBpW6Q5Xig8ZxfYGC+B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmY2YzM4YS0zNmMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdsX-cqwfToVv5fqT9rlUunZ31glO_M6HC_CWakys-0=&emci=95ca7009-f9b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f2f6c38a-36c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1437603)

[_**But with a lot of hard work, I became a physician, and Raja became a Congressman. We took our parents’ determination and we were able to achieve the promise of the American middle class. I know Raja's been working so hard to take back the House for Democrats. That’s why I’m doing all that I can to raise 1,244 donations in the next 11 hours. And at the end of every day, Raja still finds time to be a dedicated brother, husband, and father.

And at the end of every day, Raja still finds time to be a dedicated brother, husband, and father. = | **= = = = = =** Thank you so much for supporting Raja, Ram Krishnamoorthi | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
