name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call: New US Rep. Delia Ramirez, Chicago Teachers Union President Stacy Davis Gates, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: US Rep. Delia Ramirez (IL-3) on Progressive Power | Chicago
Teachers Union President Stacey Davis Gates on Mayoral Runoff | Shawn
Denney for Mayor in Lawrence, IN | One Fair Wage Update | NEW! ‘Birdie
Sanders’ Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1011&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1012&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call kicks off at 8:30 pm
ET/5:30 PT this Monday!

The first Latina from the Midwest to serve in Congress, US Rep. Delia
Ramirez (IL-3) will talk to us about how progressives are building power
to deliver for working people.

We’ll hear from Chicago Teachers Union President Stacy Davis Gates on the
opportunity to elect Brandon Johnson as a progressive mayor in the city
next month!

Then, Shawn Denney will talk about his candidacy for Mayor in Lawrence,
IN; and, Our Revolution Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky will give
an update on our work to end subminimum wages state by state.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1013&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1014&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country this year, and
we’re going big to build local power!

On Monday’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ]Organizing Call, we’ll dig into the big Chicago runoff race
between Brandon Johnson, a former public school teacher and union
organizer, and Paul Vallas, a public school privatizer who calls himself
“more of a Republican than a Democrat.”

In Tuesday’s election in St. Louis, where we hold a progressive majority,
nearly our entire slate advanced to the general election — including Mayor
Tashaura Jones, Board President Megan Green, and 9 of our 10 ward
candidates!

We’ve got more opportunities to build progressive power through upcoming
elections in Philly, Nashville, Dallas, NYC and more!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1016&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1017&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8448?t=1018&akid=4110%2E5885482%2E_benrF ]RSVP to participate in the Zoom directly
and make connections in the chat!

subject: Relentless Attacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
I'm not afraid to do what it takes to get us there and that's why Biden and his allies consider me Washington's biggest enemy.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424029:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "Headline") Peter: It's working! The more we put pressure on Joe Biden and his wayward policies, the more he's complaining to his supporters about it. He's deflecting and now trying to make me the butt of his jokes. But I want to make one thing clear, he's damaging our great nation and it's no laughing matter. I called him out at the State of the Union because our economy is in shambles, and he lied about it. He lied about our border being overrun by terrorists and illegal border invaders. China is attacking us from a cyber war to spy balloons and he's doing nothing about it. **[Unfortunately, nothing is going to change unless we keep calling out the lies. Will you chip in a donation of $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and help me keep pressure up on old Joe?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424029:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "Unfortunately, nothing is going to change unless we keep calling
out the lies. Will you chip in a donation of $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and help me keep pressure up on old Joe?")** Ask the families in East Palestine, Ohio if they think Biden is in their corner as much as he is with the people in the Ukraine. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424029:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "Video")Ask the parents of the children dying from fentanyl if they think Biden cares about this crisis. So far, Joe only seems to care about controlling our lives and enriching his family. He's doing it with a weaponized FBI, DOJ and IRS, and he expects us to pay for it. That's why I'm working hard in Congress to investigate and expose his corruption. It's no longer about if Biden will be caught, but just a matter of when we release the smoking gun and remove him from office. **[That's why I need you by my side in this fight with a donation of ANY amount you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424029:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "That’s why I need you by my side in this fight with a
donation of ANY amount you can afford.")** **Biden 's attacks on me are no different than when Hillary referred to us as "deplorables."** These elitists have disdain for us because they know we value freedom and will stand in their way so they try to refocus the media on anything other than their own actions. **Biden doesn 't want us holding him accountable for his crimes any more than he wants us holding China accountable for spreading COVID-19 around the globe.** He'd rather just find a way to blame President Trump and freedom-loving Americans like you for standing in his way. It's that same attitude that caused crazy people to attack me in restaurants recently. Blaming others has he and Maxine Waters encouraging their supporters to attack conservatives again--it's out-of-control! **[Will you chip in at least $50 TODAY and stand with me in this fight?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424028:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "Will you chip in at least $50 TODAY and stand with me in this
fight?")** We need to save our country and bring it back to its greatness. I'm not afraid to do what it takes to get us there and that's why Biden and his allies consider me Washington's biggest enemy. They know I won't sleep until Biden is held accountable and that's why they're doing everything they can to stop me. **[Help make sure I have the ammo to fight back against the Washington establishment, the leftist media and the Biden Corruption Machine. Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62424029:6ny3sfGbN:m:1:3331421248:DF7E616334ACFC70E6376DC565BB4845:r "Help make sure I have the ammo to fight back against the
Washington establishment, the leftist media and the Biden Corruption Machine. Donate TODAY!")** The Swamp's attacks against me are relentless, but with you in my corner, it's all worth it and I will find a way to endure their smears. Thank you for your continued support. Yours in the fight, Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.

body:
| |

|

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

State Democrats are facing a slew of critical special elections this year – some that Republicans have dumped six figures into! That’s why President Obama called on Democrats everywhere (including your state!) to stand up and take action. As a former state legislator, President Obama knows the vital importance of joining together to create change in our statehouses. name: Team AOC
subject: Drag is not dangerous! 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Team AOC is organizing to fight back against the disinformation being spread by anti-LGBTQ politicians and media.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230311-3992-header&t=1&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
This past Sunday, we marched in Sunnyside’s St. Pat’s for All Parade — which began in response to the exclusion of Irish LGBTQ+ communities from the 5th Avenue parade.
**Across the nation, we’ve seen an alarming spike in anti-LGBTQ+ — specifically anti-trans — bills being introduced in state legislatures.** And just last weekend, at the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC), Speaker Michael Knowles of the Daily Wire called for the “eradication” of “transgenderism”.
Team AOC is working to support organizations and efforts to inform and fight back against the disinformation being spread by anti-LGBTQ+ politicians and media.
[**That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Will you please join us in defending our LGBTQ+ siblings by making an urgent $3 contribution today to Equality Federation?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230311.BEVPIG&refcode=em20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
**[Donate](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230311.BEVPIG&refcode=em20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)**
_100% of your donation will go to Equality Federation._
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230311.BEVPIG&refcode=em20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
**Equality Federation is an advocacy accelerator rooted in social justice and focused on building power for state-based lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, and queer (LGBTQ+) advocacy organizations.**
Just last week, **Tennessee Governor Bill Lee signed two anti-LGBTQ+ bills into law:**
* The first bans drag performances on public property in the state, as well as at any location where people under 18 could be present.
* The second bans age-appropriate, medically necessary health care for transgender youth.

These bans are not about “child safety” — they are an attempt to label our queer and trans siblings as dangerous, and force the LGBTQ+ community back into the closet.
Anti-drag bills have also been introduced in twelve other states. In fact, there are more than 375 bills targeting LGBTQ+ rights in the U.S. So, it’s no surprise that nearly 1 in 5 of any type of hate crime is now motivated by anti-LGBTQ+ bias. In fact, the last two years have been the deadliest on record for trans people — especially Black trans women.1
[**The trans and queer community is under attack. We cannot stand aside — help us fight back by making a donation today to Equality Federation.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230311.BEVPIG&refcode=em20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
Thank you for taking action today,
Team AOC
P.S. If you would like to help us combat the rise in anti-LGBTQ+ legislation across the country, [**sign up for notifications about local and national actions here.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17879?utm_source=em20230311-3992&t=6&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
* * *
1 - [Producer Entertainment Group Instagram](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17880?t=7&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230311?refcode=em20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=8&refcode2=3992_2526796_z5Cgqd&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230311-3992-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=9&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=10&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=11&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=12&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=13&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=3992%2E2526796%2Ez5Cgqd)

name: John Bisognano
subject: I get asked this question all the time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
the answer could determine control of the House in 2024
|
---

Team,

I get asked this question all the time: “What is the NDRC going to focus on now that the 2021-2022 redistricting is over?”

**I always give the same answer:_Redistricting isn’t over!_ Not by a long shot.**

Voters are continuing to challenge gerrymandered maps in a dozen or more key states across the country – _and as many as 19 House districts could be redrawn by the next election._ Considering Republicans only hold the majority by four votes, that’s more than enough to swing control of the chamber.

[**_That’s why the NDRC is continuing our fight for fair maps at the federal and state level, and I’m hoping we can count on your ongoing support. Will you make a donation right now to help us end unfair gerrymandering?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60052346/395850718/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230311_FR_3F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZDY4NjA1LTQxYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuO5b_FlKevVj3V8pGVkPaHl_2b-8Yw7ttXp820CM_k=) | [Chip in to support the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60052349/395850719/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230311_FR_3F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZDY4NjA1LTQxYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuO5b_FlKevVj3V8pGVkPaHl_2b-8Yw7ttXp820CM_k=)
---
Make no mistake, team: The road ahead is not going to be easy. We fully expect map-manipulating politicians to continue fighting tooth and nail for gerrymandered districts. In fact, some Republicans are even trying to _undo_ fair maps!

But I know that our grassroots movement has what it takes to succeed – after all, ahead of the last election, we helped secure what _The New York Times_ called **“the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”**

So now, we have two choices.
(1) We can assume our work is complete, and let map-manipulating politicians roll back our progress.

(2) We can keep fighting, work to secure _even fairer_ maps, and help ensure Democrats can compete on a level playing field in 2024.
Remember, President Barack Obama warned us that **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”**
[**_It’s grassroots supporters like you who give the NDRC the energy and drive that has made our movement so successful, team. Please, will you pitch in now to help us continue executing our proven strategy across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60052351/395850742/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230311_FR_3F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhZDY4NjA1LTQxYzAtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuO5b_FlKevVj3V8pGVkPaHl_2b-8Yw7ttXp820CM_k=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: the answer could determine control of the House in 2024 | Team, I get asked this question all the time: “What is the NDRC going to focus on now that the 2021-2022 redistricting is over?” I always give the same answer:Redistricting isn’t over! Not by a long shot. Voters are continuing to challenge gerrymandered maps in a dozen or more key states across the country – and as many as 19 House districts could be redrawn by the next election. Considering Republicans only hold the majority by four votes, that’s more than enough to swing control of the chamber. = | = Make no mistake, team: The road ahead is not going to be easy. We fully expect map-manipulating politicians to continue fighting tooth and nail for gerrymandered districts. In fact, some Republicans are even trying to undo fair maps! But I know that our grassroots movement has what it takes to succeed – after all, ahead of the last election, we helped secure what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” So now, we have two choices. (1) We can assume our work is complete, and let map-manipulating politicians roll back our progress. (2) We can keep fighting, work to secure even fairer maps, and help ensure Democrats can compete on a level playing field in 2024. Remember, President Barack Obama warned us that “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = With gratitude, Biz = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley and I both took oaths to defend our democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I didn’t break mine.
#
This week, some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight, Peter.
Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. **He ran away from the same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours earlier.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28589?refcode=em20230311-2856&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2856%2E614464%2EiF2hVH)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28589?refcode=em20230311-2856&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2856%2E614464%2EiF2hVH)**
As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. **But unlike him, I didn’t break mine.**
That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.
**We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.[Will you add your first donation of $10 or anything at all right now so we can defeat him, flip this seat, and stand up for our democracy?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28589?refcode=em20230311-2856&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2856%2E614464%2EiF2hVH)**

subject: Walgreens is REFUSING to dispense legal medications
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60055064/395851578/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViOGRlMGQtNDNjMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yXkyJq7ujpUPDh52pe2L7qi4ey63H_5noEqpT65TR-0=)
---
**Breaking news, Peter:** Walgreens has confirmed that they will not be distributing medication abortion pills, the most common method of abortion in the U.S., even in some states where abortion remains legal. This decision is thanks to mounting pressure from conservatives and intense lobbying from forced-birth extremist groups. We’re still waiting to hear from the Texas judge who will decide if one pill of the two-step regimen will remain FDA approved — but even if it does, Walgreens has still decided to cut off access to the pill for tens of millions of people across the country. This is OUTRAGEOUS. Walgreens is turning its back on its patients who rely on them for care in favor of a loud minority. [_**We’ve created a petition demanding Walgreens provide the legal medications their customers need — will you add your name right now to show you agree?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60055065/395851579/-2136700562?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViOGRlMGQtNDNjMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yXkyJq7ujpUPDh52pe2L7qi4ey63H_5noEqpT65TR-0=&emci=41b8de0d-43c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45b8de0d-43c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60055066/395851580/-2136700562?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230311_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViOGRlMGQtNDNjMC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yXkyJq7ujpUPDh52pe2L7qi4ey63H_5noEqpT65TR-0=&emci=41b8de0d-43c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45b8de0d-43c0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400)

name: Carolina, United We Dream Action
subject: It’s time to make it official Peter
body:
Make your commitment to fight for immigrants: | | | Hi Peter, We’ve covered a lot in the last couple days but I hope you’re really starting to feel like the critical member of our team that you are! I’m so excited to get to work with you on all the important things we need to do this year and beyond. **Here’s the game plan: In 2023, we’re going to stop at nothing to hold politicians accountable for their actions — or more often, their lack of action.** For too long, politicians have put us on hold or have outright failed our communities. They have not given us the priority, dignity, and respect that we deserve. But to succeed, we need to be a loud, strong movement. There is POWER in numbers, and this is why I’m asking you to take the next step and become an UWDA member. [**Will you become an official UWDA Member today? It’s as easy as a one-time donation of $7!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8XbdGlzmCkuW9Tywj59n-dcyCDtycKT-B75piO0eqXNk0bFcU2r-lC83eWhCfvdvSPR1EO6_pKFWm8V8N1Tk4J6D4rmUzaY8PGb6gBTzOCyQjLU0IegcLe0SPkrEZsGnzBk9C8_2JKmwhUQ_n0lYmrNttSqv8vCeAv7lc-1311YyWc4Id5soBXTMerwF4i4xtGp0wkgnIBfyqOBqUCiMcvCRWnIZwJ2NEiS6wr1LoQjthwghiIIyu8olIDaFbYwg8OowiVcUPdGbzAh2fMPEdxg3i76ylywY5iimW-lQl59ri4VRh8GdpgBd99ULDBwzvOaSuDzcueMfYGLuBfRBoUnmUa7Olgnh2Pqie4Cz_r6H7_fQQ5dorEJFJfaOq6jw7/3ue/B4WpxzqGT9CHX2nnY1zjCw/h0/X7K7XonBHJsFlNal6sTYoWqGHQ2mxPv5rQF0ynsbnZ8) **And just like that, you’ll secure your spot in the largest political home fighting for immigrants and the undocumented community.** **[JOIN TODAY FOR $7](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8XbdGlzmCkuW9Tywj59n-dcyCDtycKT-B75piO0eqXNmt9teZxfYqE2lHhPKVKyyFOKShfRlCOGsuZdTEUOQMlm3yd0npytLz4Gt2mFvpYOehR5KC6Ms3Q2TagU8fXDCy-jJnBXFk3K_9ulYmhKfhVz8YwiCDc06x7VQX8dSQIOaq9MZ1CbK5iDr-ZKbJtQK3fFK-fTP03AN_M5UnVJp7z6aR-9hRcLWeEbYvr4Pc2_HUgVAzwP0mbtncg6MZBDFJUl1Rrs9eSssS02WF1MCrS3H6PU9MJk6Eonjs1awEsToyMt4ZuOqHcHyBxh0kVbw_p0yhv-OyY9ukiLzKln8Wu_8LSm-ZIz0FVCe77nYLkSMLsmAS9D0kKHNUfFLom8zd/3ue/B4WpxzqGT9CHX2nnY1zjCw/h1/d5XFYT-6E8Psc4tNYJzaX3vVEx84W--HMsSYTh6IOcU)** By becoming a member today, **you’ll be on the frontlines for every fight we have ahead of us and will be the FIRST to receive critical action alerts and updates — including invites to special events with UWDA endorsed candidates** Joining the team couldn’t come at a more important moment for our communities. name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: How I trained 55,000 students in liberty in 2022
body:
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gdYOeXDIoQ-1px537yFxlqhAUAiq-PsGVFWybHk8mhmTBiEVF6zjUDvdoQFv66DxhuzGAKBniH2rBpSD6TsJVjAkXnU3mk2YWp-I8hiWb0qu7Edr41yPGhUKya0YACxYBYo55bzkZjCgBubrSY85r1vFXir8KLWR3RO1ZiEX8ylSMB_3xZkc4tL4mBqycYlzsA253V7wycmuTtqtP2GawiZkCfa8gp05zLxOwR-6kq8V4hjcVsZliXtmD3O_f6WjoX5tPvkDn-cR30rPx0r_zD-R9vr3ROX7L0mtXvA)

Friend,

Capitalism is evil, socialism is moral, and you should rely on the government for all your needs: _**this is what schools are teaching students. **_

Socialists are trying to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism and indoctrinate the next generation. But we can counter these ideas by introducing students to the ideas of liberty and free markets.

The Foundation for Economic Education is taking action with **FEE in the Classroom.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.

Last year we trained over 55,000 students and teachers in liberty and free market ideas. **And with your help, FEE is on track to reach over 65,000 students and teachers this year. **

To help achieve that goal, we're raising $50,000 by the end of the month.

[_**Will you join me in sharing a pro-liberty alternative with 65,000 students this year? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gdYOeXDIoQ-1px537yFxlqhAUAiq-PsGVFWybHk8mhmTBiEVF6zjUDvdoQFv66DxhuzGAKBniH2rBpSD6TsJVjAkXnU3mk2YWp-I8hiWb0qu7Edr41yPGhUKya0YACxYBYo55bzkZjCgBubrSY85r1vFXir8KLWR3RO1ZiEX8ylSMB_3xZkc4tL4mBqycYlzsA253V7wycmuTtqtP2GawiZkCfa8gp05zLxOwR-6kq8V4hjcVsZliXtmD3O_f6WjoX5tPvkDn-cR30rPx0r_zD-R9vr3ROX7L0mtXvA)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans _**to think outside the box and challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

Our educational workshops feature acclaimed college professors and successful entrepreneurs who bring the concepts of individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship to life.

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gdYOeXDIoQ-1px537yFxlqhAUAiq-PsGVFWybHk8mhmTBiEVF6zjUDvdoQFv66DxhuzGAKBniH2rBpSD6TsJVjAkXnU3mk2YWp-I8hiWb0qu7Edr41yPGhUKya0YACxYBYo55bzkZjCgBubrSY85r1vFXir8KLWR3RO1ZiEX8ylSMB_3xZkc4tL4mBqycYlzsA253V7wycmuTtqtP2GawiZkCfa8gp05zLxOwR-6kq8V4hjcVsZliXtmD3O_f6WjoX5tPvkDn-cR30rPx0r_zD-R9vr3ROX7L0mtXvA)

In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

[_**Help students learn the importance of liberty and free markets >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9T8tuhDAM_Bq4gdYOeXDIoQ-1px537yFxlqhAUAiq-PsGVFWybHk8mhmTBiEVF6zjUDvdoQFv66DxhuzGAKBniH2rBpSD6TsJVjAkXnU3mk2YWp-I8hiWb0qu7Edr41yPGhUKya0YACxYBYo55bzkZjCgBubrSY85r1vFXir8KLWR3RO1ZiEX8ylSMB_3xZkc4tL4mBqycYlzsA253V7wycmuTtqtP2GawiZkCfa8gp05zLxOwR-6kq8V4hjcVsZliXtmD3O_f6WjoX5tPvkDn-cR30rPx0r_zD-R9vr3ROX7L0mtXvA)

These subjects are extremely important in our everyday lives, but the Radical Left doesn't think students are old enough to learn them.

A basic understanding of economics is key. The younger generation needs to know how to handle money, understand inflation, and more before they step out on their own.

And FEE in the Classroom is a chance for these students to learn those topics.

**FEE in the Classroom is your opportunity to pass the torch of liberty to thousands of students, Friend.**

Can I count on you to support _FEE in the Classroom_ and help reach 65,000 students this year? **Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9j0FvhCAQhX8N3jQwIOiBQ9vN9tTj7h1hWElVDGIa_33RNE0mM5k3Ly_foGZSda3komWV0wIM87YKGihwyhljPQfom24ANZheKGYlB2yJoDibMDU-IeYxLN-YXNmPxsa5GrWgomOMCsON80M7dJ1xiCC5F4OUklaTHnNeN8LfCNxLbWj3hI1Z0MV8hhTNx31xJoe41D6mGm1c4hxsjW63l3x6siP8buZizYTfGK2SdutPmKawSVUwXxfmSWXmdQr-0ES9E4AxuK2MCwD2zJ_m8fhKR439Wn-2T3idR_goPR8r_jv_Qprr-1NVt1-Tb2MV)

clean_body: Friend, Capitalism is evil, socialism is moral, and you should rely on the government for all your needs: this is what schools are teaching students. Socialists are trying to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism and indoctrinate the next generation. But we can counter these ideas by introducing students to the ideas of liberty and free markets. The Foundation for Economic Education is taking action with FEE in the Classroom. Let me introduce myself. My name is Zilvinas Silenas, and I am President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society. Last year we trained over 55,000 students and teachers in liberty and free market ideas. And with your help, FEE is on track to reach over 65,000 students and teachers this year. To help achieve that goal, we're raising $50,000 by the end of the month. FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans to think outside the box and challenge the mainstream narrative. Our educational workshops feature acclaimed college professors and successful entrepreneurs who bring the concepts of individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship to life. In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation. These subjects are extremely important in our everyday lives, but the Radical Left doesn't think students are old enough to learn them. A basic understanding of economics is key. The younger generation needs to know how to handle money, understand inflation, and more before they step out on their own. And FEE in the Classroom is a chance for these students to learn those topics. FEE in the Classroom is your opportunity to pass the torch of liberty to thousands of students, Friend. Can I count on you to support FEE in the Classroom and help reach 65,000 students this year? Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month. Thank you, Zilvinas Silenas President Foundation for Economic Education FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Tell Us: How do you feel about unions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Did you know that just last year, **unions hit their highest approval among Americans since 1965?** Something important is happening here -- a labor movement that won’t take no for an answer.
Without labor unions, we wouldn't have the weekend, overtime pay, workplace safety rules, and laws protecting against child labor exploitation -- **_and that’s just scratching the surface._** Unions have helped secure every major labor law we have in America, and this is just the beginning.
**Now, with the reintroduction of the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, we’re so close to passing major, transformational protections for workers.** And we won’t stop until it’s law.
History has proven over and over again the power of organized labor. That’s why **I promise you I will never stop fighting for a better life for us all -- but I need your help to convince my colleagues to pass the PRO Act immediately.**
[**Can you sign right now to demand Congress pass the PRO Act NOW and show your support for workers across America?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230311-PRO-Act-Petition_resend/20230311-2261?t=1&akid=2261%2E420207%2EmiUW_V)
**[Add Your Name >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230311-PRO-Act-Petition_resend/20230311-2261?t=2&akid=2261%2E420207%2EmiUW_V)**
**We must ensure Congress passes the PRO Act to protect working people across America.** The PRO Act will empower workers to unionize, and bargain for better wages and working conditions, hold corporations accountable for union-busting, and repeal so-called “right to work” laws.
I was proud to be an original lead sponsor of the PRO Act in the House, where we passed it in 2021. Now we have the chance to pass it again, and I won’t stop fighting until this bill reaches President Biden’s desk.
The fearmongers will try to tell us we’re too radical, that our demands are impossible, that they come at too high a cost, that they hurt small businesses, that people will lose jobs. **We only need to look at my hometown Seattle to prove them wrong -- union jobs and protections help us all.**
[**Will you join me and call on Congress to prioritize the PRO Act right away so we can finally secure the biggest labor protections in decades?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230311-PRO-Act-Petition_resend/20230311-2261?t=3&akid=2261%2E420207%2EmiUW_V)
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230311-PRO-Act-Petition_resend/20230311-2261?t=4&akid=2261%2E420207%2EmiUW_V)**
Thank you for taking action today.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230311-2261-footer&t=5&refcode2=2261_420207_miUW_V&akid=2261%2E420207%2EmiUW_V)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Team IDCCA
subject: April 4 is around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
We need you on our team to beat back extremism this April.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hr8l1QLUGe3eP0aQXLqD9f9dt1ljYFZLlA_zivA39vM=/-rpD7k_xPdIjgFJoI2veOTCZngN6vs5lwuK5VlAkoEQ=?refcode=EM_FR_230311DefeatExtremism_Team_90DO_3_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Thanks to dedicated activists like you, Illinois, and our entire country, have made great progress towards a society that works for everyone. As we continue to take strides forward towards a more perfect union, the right has resorted to extremism in order to force us backwards.

You may only hear about the most blatant forms of extremism spewed out by far-right figureheads like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, or Marjorie Taylor Greene. **But, fellow Democrats, right-wing extremists are at the doorstep of our local offices, schools, libraries, and communities here in Illinois. With over 6,000 offices statewide on the ballot on April 4th, the IDCCA and our County Chairs are on the front lines fighting back against these extremists.**

Extremists only have one goal: to take our entire society backwards to a less equitable, less fair, and much less just world. Progress is on the line, and it is up to us to keep our nation moving forward.

**[We need to stop them from sneaking into office and using local government to spread that agenda. With the election just weeks away, we need you on our team, fellow Democrats. Pitch in $10 right away to help us get out the vote and give progressive candidates the support they need to beat back extremism this April 4th.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Hr8l1QLUGe3eP0aQXLqD9f9dt1ljYFZLlA_zivA39vM=/-rpD7k_xPdIjgFJoI2veOTCZngN6vs5lwuK5VlAkoEQ=?refcode=EM_FR_230311DefeatExtremism_Team_90DO_3_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Congress: Don’t cut Social Security or Medicare!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Social Security has been a promise and a critical safety net to working
Americans for decades.

But right now, Kevin McCarthy is holding debt ceiling legislation hostage
in exchange for cuts to Social Security and Medicare. Republicans even
want to create a “commission” which will attempt to cut Social Security
out of the public eye.

Justice Democrats will always fight to strengthen the social safety net.
We’re urging Congress to take the pledge never to cut Social Security or
Medicare. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130974?t=1001&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A ]Will you add your name to demand that Congress pledges to
never cut Social Security or Medicare?

Sign the Petition

Our Social Security system is the most popular government program that
there is, and cutting Social Security and Medicare would only be a handout
to millionaires and billionaires. It’s time for a tax system that benefits
working people and ensures the top 1%, Wall Street, and large corporations
pay their fair share.

Expanding Social Security with no cuts is the will of the overwhelming
majority of Americans. To do that, we need to elect progressives who will
govern for the 99%, not corporations and the rich.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130974?t=1002&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A ]Justice Democrats is asking every member of Congress to pledge never to
vote to cut Social Security or Medicare — under any circumstances. We must
expand Social Security benefits for all recipients and protect pensions.
Tell Congress to never vote to cut Social Security or Medicare under any
circumstances now.

Sign the Petition

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230311-27931-footer&t=1005&refcode2=27931_1203867_TCa74A&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=27931%2E1203867%2ETCa74A

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: It’s official: illegal immigrants can now VOTE in U.S. elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
|
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_s=fda6b1042de74a65992462bb1d9ffcab&_t=rT8jajkJsBadfmMZV9yh4yPBhQYIC2udS1ASHs4p9_07HODxh6hG-D4qOfmGxHnvIRUJ3B1qPLT15hZ6o1RGU-1qi5QCUSioUtPO-ODN5tQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_s=fda6b1042de74a65992462bb1d9ffcab&_t=rT8jajkJsBadfmMZV9yh4yPBhQYIC2udS1ASHs4p9_07HODxh6hG-D4qOfmGxHnvIRUJ3B1qPLT15hZ6o1RGU-1qi5QCUSioUtPO-ODN5tQ%3D)

| **It 's official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=fda6b1042de74a65992462bb1d9ffcab&_e=p7ehxUMu3gV0MHXfIOw2IGFOLRxDGZg5mtPyJAL5gVcYKBtZoQEHL1oQ0ZhHPPS0drs2Fo6Gv5K3eiMGUFJ5NgdE-RSmVSjspNtJF_lVlEjJme01OUuCoucFbidGjnT7X-EsgYJCt3rs1t98Z7CW6IpNCyOK-89enX-OV0OYS9PE8ahn3Fif1uzZlNR_cWYViah99XmyCFpwnH1Ggoe9ewDQPDa3DuoNQfvA4xv5wA8FpQOm1ujybsN3vXsEFSbQl-0lsghbkJv_UFO2prZx232WMR-EO4BMpPO78H1CQVvSkYh8rcZ5tnLm818tr50JLauSeLelhEiyqP0aG69ZyXWs7D4hyZjUCpbMxAY6BalgT_I9N3l-ai8ryZoY1xHWGcXIY5uUPi0DcvcqSluhy6MztfGZCKmdObkVHMkElqY%3D "This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. Whether you live in DC or not, this development impacts ALL AMERICANS - so we need to hear from you right here and right now:

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Her story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=37%2E35263%2EAZ8P83 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter, let’s talk about our favorite senator, Tammy Baldwin:

Tammy’s a trailblazer, and she’s no stranger to historic campaigns. She
was the first woman to represent Wisconsin in both the House of
Representatives and the Senate — and in 2012, she became the first openly
gay Senator in our nation’s history.

But Tammy didn’t run to make history, she ran to make a difference for all
Americans — and we’re so proud to say she’s done just that.

In office, she has championed legislation to support women — from bills to
expand access to breast and cervical cancer screenings to protecting
reproductive health care access, she uses her voice in the government to
advance our priorities.

This Women’s History Month, we are honored to walk in the trails blazed by
amazing women like Tammy — who have taken on the fight for equality and
the call for public service.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/220?t=1004&akid=37%2E35263%2EAZ8P83 ]Photo of young Tammy Baldwin

There’s still so much work ahead of us, but when we elect leaders like
Tammy Baldwin, we know there’s someone in our government who will fight
every day to protect and expand women’s rights and freedoms across our
country.

We’ll need to come together and amplify Tammy’s story to ensure she can
continue fighting in the Senate for years to come. [ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/683?t=1005&akid=37%2E35263%2EAZ8P83 ]So, can we count on
you to support Tammy’s campaign and help us keep a champion for women in
the Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/215?t=1006&akid=37%2E35263%2EAZ8P83 ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/220?t=1011&akid=37%2E35263%2EAZ8P83 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you, Peter,

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

body:
| | | **BREAKING: New Supreme Court case could THREATEN Social Security's funding!**

_We urgently need to know where you stand on this issue -- but we have**NO RECORD** of your answer:_

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12317?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&akid=10097%2E9716520%2ExTC51E)
**Should the Supreme Court protect Social Security?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12317?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&akid=10097%2E9716520%2ExTC51E)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12317?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230311-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSSocialSecurityUpdatex2-Pros-sl1&akid=10097%2E9716520%2ExTC51E)
---

Team, this is a RED ALERT for Social Security:

**_FIRST:_** Amy Coney Barrett infamously REFUSED to say if Social Security was constitutional during her confirmation hearings.

**_THEN:_** Top Republicans announced a plan to SUNSET Social Security every five years.

**_NOW:_** The Supreme Court is about to hear a _**dangerous**_ new case that experts say could lead to _**STRIKING DOWN Social Security's funding!**_

**Millions of Americans could LOSE benefits they've earned if the Court's ultra-MAGA justices take aim at Social Security -- so we can't let that happen.** We've launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that Americans want to protect Social Security, _but we're still short 39 responses in Pennsylvania!_

subject: it’s simple, Peter

body:
Sinema has to go

| Peter, this couldn’t be more simple:

**When Kyrsten Sinema switched parties, she betrayed Democrats like you who helped her get elected, and put our Senate Majority in grave danger.** 1️⃣ Sinema repeatedly sided with Republicans, refusing to abolish the filibuster and _holding up crucial progress on things like voting rights and abortion rights._

2️⃣ Sinema raked in millions from Corporate, Wall Street, and Big Money donors.

3️⃣ And now, because of Sinema, we’re going to have to work **twice as hard** to win in Arizona! _She could spoil the race and hand the seat to a MAGA Republican!_ _But we’ll be honest, before we proceed with our strategy to hold our Senate Majority, we need to know what top Democrats like you think:_

clean_body: Sinema has to go | Peter, this couldn’t be more simple: When Kyrsten Sinema switched parties, she betrayed Democrats like you who helped her get elected, and put our Senate Majority in grave danger. 1️⃣ Sinema repeatedly sided with Republicans, refusing to abolish the filibuster and holding up crucial progress on things like voting rights and abortion rights. 2️⃣ Sinema raked in millions from Corporate, Wall Street, and Big Money donors. 3️⃣ And now, because of Sinema, we’re going to have to work twice as hard to win in Arizona! She could spoil the race and hand the seat to a MAGA Republican! | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Chinese espionage to giving a preview of the first House hearing on Biden's Afghanistan blunder, here’s a peek at what Mike has been up to this past week.
---
**In the News**
---
**WALTZ ON TAKING DOWN THE CARTELS** Tuesday morning, Mike kicked off the week by joining Fox News' [Fox & Friends First](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=68aa79bf961d40fba361ef3c64976dfb&_e=aGszY_gaCsp2bkOzygOOpExgxL2q-vz6nqtt2bZHAe9BllhkiZnk9r4RUjfi8VlU3KAQX6bMqMtVUG2ujPjH4bimcQ-OuB31n3cN8E6cCh1Wv9TQtI2LSDUR_r_kLQzIY9_l2J9Np0MNH7z79i7XVNqIJB0wc7WqqS2HOoK03n4lEilLXJmXFQDztOd3eSi-a82jPwAu5eUXmcrxlNH_SgdKW3LyivSvjup7HG4EAApBn9KHmgb3qtX0TmogmcrEfGp5KnOMaJ_85cl2_-jNxScAJabDg0jlx0EL4MEamR1_ahYoW_6YAGIHpmTaZG5l). to discuss his efforts to combat Mexican cartels and a report that China may be using using spy cranes in the U.S. _"We have to realize that these cartels in Mexico have declared war on the United States. They control our border. They are killing tens of thousands of American citizens and we need to deploy ever asset we have, not just law enforcement, to dismantle them." _

clean_body: | | | | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Chinese espionage to giving a preview of the first House hearing on Biden's Afghanistan blunder, here’s a peek at what Mike has been up to this past week. In the News WALTZ ON TAKING DOWN THE CARTELS Tuesday morning, Mike kicked off the week by joining Fox News' . to discuss his efforts to combat Mexican cartels and a report that China may be using using spy cranes in the U.S. "We have to realize that these cartels in Mexico have declared war on the United States. They control our border. They are killing tens of thousands of American citizens and we need to deploy ever asset we have, not just law enforcement, to dismantle them." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON BOTCHED AFGHAN WITHDRAWAL On Wednesday, Mike joined Fox News' to discuss the first House hearing on the Biden Administration's disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan. "This [hearing] is going to be a voice for those grassroots veterans organizations, including the soldiers who were there... You're going to hear the frustration and the betrayal that they faced from the State Department who was not doing their job." Watch the entire segment . WALTZ ON HOUSE GOP TAKING ON AFGHANISTAN WITHDRAWAL Also on Wednesday, Mike continued the conversation around Biden's Afghan withdrawal on Newsmax's , giving a preview of what to expect in the much-awaited hearing. "[This hearing] is going to emotional, painful, but also cathartic. The entire veterans community has been demanding answers, and the Democrats in charge of the House had refused to hold hearings on this debacle." Watch the entire clip . subject: Help us put reproductive rights on the Ohio ballot!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio Democrats voted to endorse the reproductive rights ballot initiative!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60057475/395862271/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc2ZTFjOC01MWMwLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PG0fqX4MQ1S0JERzaGZj3UFQDYIJa2r1gHFnKN7N5s4=) | Team — I have an important update:

**The Ohio Democrats just endorsed a commonsense abortion rights ballot initiative, and now, we need your help to get it on the ballot!**

We've put a plan together to collect the signatures needed from every corner of Ohio. It's going to take serious resources, and we're counting on your support to help us hit the ground running.

**[Democrats have always been the party of choice. Folks — While House Republicans are hyper-focused on causing a debt-ceiling crisis to try to force cuts to critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, Martin is working to:
* Advance President Biden’s budget, which would lower healthcare and prescription drug costs, expand access to affordable, high-quality childcare, fund clean energy initiatives, reduce housing costs, and invest in Tribal communities and infrastructure.

* Bring forward legislation to advance America’s clean-energy future, including creating clean-energy jobs.

* Pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ to protect abortion access as it’s under attack — from proposed state laws that would charge women who seek abortions with _homicide_ , to an impending federal court decision that could take a safe, widely used abortion drug off the market.

body:

Friend, here’s why this is so concerning:
**First,** DeSantis made his first trip to Iowa on Friday, a key state for the Republican presidential primary.
**Then,** DeSantis mobilized the GOP base in Nevada by sharing his right-wing playbook for winning.
**Now, it's being reported that DeSantis is gearing up for a presidential run in 2024 – and he needs to be stopped.**
Make no mistake: DeSantis has a dangerous record. As the governor of Florida, he has signed an extreme abortion ban, attacked voting rights, and pushed a hate-fueled agenda. A former member of the right-wing House Freedom Caucus, he supported cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
**That's why it's so urgent for us to confirm where grassroots Democrats like you stand, but we're still missing 27 responses from your area – including yours, friend. So please, tell us right now:**

name: Sen. Elizabeth Warren (via Democrats.org)
subject: How we stop the GOP’s extremist agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Together, we can stop Republicans in their tracks. Every single donation helps strengthen this team so we can win back the House and protect our Senate majority. | |
---
I’d like to think that politicians run for office to help people. But the GOP doesn’t seem to agree. Congressional Republicans have kicked off the year by scheming to jeopardize Social Security and Medicare, proposing a nationwide 30 percent sales tax on everything from groceries to gasoline, and threatening to crash our nation’s economy by not raising the debt ceiling. In other words, Republicans are working hard to make things a whole lot harder for working and middle-class families and seniors. And this is just the tip of the iceberg. Republicans across the country are plotting to pass bills that take rights away from trans people, restrict abortion access, and control what our educators can teach at school. Democrats are fighting back, but if Republicans gain any ground in 2024 -- and they’re strategizing on how to do that right now -- they’ll continue pursuing their extremist agenda. But we have the power right now to stop them. **I’m in this fight all the way. Your support of this grassroots team has already made a huge difference in this work. If you’re in this fight with me, split a $10 donation today between the DNC and my campaign to continue electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide.**

clean_body: Together, we can stop Republicans in their tracks. Every single donation helps strengthen this team so we can win back the House and protect our Senate majority. | | I’d like to think that politicians run for office to help people. But the GOP doesn’t seem to agree. Congressional Republicans have kicked off the year by scheming to jeopardize Social Security and Medicare, proposing a nationwide 30 percent sales tax on everything from groceries to gasoline, and threatening to crash our nation’s economy by not raising the debt ceiling. In other words, Republicans are working hard to make things a whole lot harder for working and middle-class families and seniors. And this is just the tip of the iceberg. Republicans across the country are plotting to pass bills that take rights away from trans people, restrict abortion access, and control what our educators can teach at school. Democrats are fighting back, but if Republicans gain any ground in 2024 -- and they’re strategizing on how to do that right now -- they’ll continue pursuing their extremist agenda. But we have the power right now to stop them. I’m in this fight all the way. Your support of this grassroots team has already made a huge difference in this work. If you’re in this fight with me, split a $10 donation today between the DNC and my campaign to continue electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Derek, we’re up against a party that wants to impose their extremist and unpopular agenda on millions of people. We can’t let Republicans gain an inch. We can stop them with a grassroots movement powered by grassroots supporters like you. We need to invest early, because that’s how we win. If the GOP takes over, they’ll derail the progress we’re making. They’ll drive an agenda chock-full of goodies for their rich donors and pain for struggling families. They’ll rip away more and more of our freedoms and threaten more and more of our democracy. Every single donation helps strengthen this team so we can win back the House and protect our Senate majority with true champions for working people. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren U.S. Senator, Massachusetts The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Adam Schiff
subject: 25 years of His Dudeness
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The Big Lebowski premiered 25 years ago
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1932%2E5257348%2E5KI5Lv)
Derek, here’s something you may not know about me:
I’m a bit of a movie buff, and honestly, a _huge_ fan of the Coen Brothers’ classic _The Big Lebowski._
And despite what you may believe, it’s not because of The Dude’s proclivity for White Russians. Or because I don’t roll on Shabbos.
I doubt there’s much I actually have in common with The Dude, or, uh, His Dudeness, or uh, Duder, or El Duderino if you’re not into the whole brevity thing...**unless it’s having roughly as many nicknames from a certain former disgraced occupant of the Oval Office.**
This week was the 25th anniversary of _The Big Lebowski._ So I thought I’d share just a few of the ways it comes up (alright fine, I _bring it up_) in my day-to-day:
I love gifting _The Big Lebowski_ to my staff on holidays.
I’ve got a license plate frame with Walter Sobchak’s immortal guidance: _“I don’t roll on Shabbos.”_
I often note when a rug really ties the room together.
I even brought it up (again) during my recent interview with _Pod Save America._
And in my opinion, the line that most often comes up working in politics, and was remarkably on point when Matt Gaetz was ripping into Kevin McCarthy during the endless speakership votes:
_“No, you’re not wrong. You’re just an a-hole.”_
I hope you’re able to take a few hours to enjoy this classic and some laughs along the way.
Eff it Dude, let’s go bowling.
— Adam

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: Sign the petition to the Senate: Quickly process backlog of Biden?s judicial nominees
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTq- ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_XgG-

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9279126&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDI3MzMzNwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDI3MzMzNwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9279126&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDI3MzMzNwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDI3MzMzNwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc9v~KVMw/Z2I4dnZPT3RtV2RiWEhYRDNJRGQ5STlZOS80bDZjOXNIM0lPTE85akFNeVdtOGN1aHpMdWRqWFI3Q3VDUVhLcnVXQTVXUTUvWStna3pmYldZdzIxMmo0MU9ZdkxMVFlzQ0NZMUd1WFdUTUk9S0/

## **[Trump Demands January 6 Committee Members Are Tried For TREASON](https://substack.com/redirect/890b04d5-05d8-4ab3-ab85-02f314299767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Harriet Alexander at The Daily Mail

**SUMMARY:
** The former president called members of the Democrat-led panel 'political hacks and thugs' that have been 'totally discredited' by the new videos.

**MY TAKE:
** You really have to hand it to President Trump. He has been subjected to nearly 8 years of unprecedented abuse and slander, he had an election stolen from him, and the DOJ has been blatantly weaponized against him and his family. Yet, President Trump has remained resolute AND level headed despite the daily attacks levied against him. Everyone loves a fighter, and President Trump is still swinging. He is the only declared Presidential candidate for 2024 who has promised to Pardon J6 defendants and prisoners, and now, President Trump is calling for the 9 members of the defunct, Soviet Style, J6 Committee to be tried for TREASON. That committee included 2 RINOs, former representatives Liz Cheney (R-WY) and Adam Kinzinger (R-IL).
**TREASON** is one of the most severe crimes someone can commit against the U.S. It carries **a minimum prison sentence of 5 years, fines up to $10,000, and a possible sentence of DEATH**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c8adea5-0962-403d-a51f-1482b8f32439?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Frankly, it's good to see President Trump take a hardline stance like this. The J6 Unselect "committee", or WITCH HUNT rather, has continued to unconstitutionally wage war against innocent, patriotic Americans who were utilizing their First Amendment right to peacefully assemble and petition their government for grievances on January 6, 2021. Sadly, the weaponization of the federal government and due process violations have become the norm in modern day America.
If you riot and burn buildings down over drug addicted, dead criminals like George Floyd, you get a pass and widespread support from the media and politicians. But, if you dare to question the legitimacy of our elections, then you can expect your own representatives to do everything in their power to be complicit as you are raided at gunpoint by the FBI, arrested, and silenced by the federal government.
We must always remember how our corrupt representatives cowered in fear on J6 when the American people finally got tired of their blatant corruption. It's clear our representatives have forgotten that they work for US, the AMERICAN PEOPLE! They are more than willing to weaponize the DOJ and FBI and sit back and do nothing as Americans are held hostage as political prisoners if that's what it takes to protect the DC Swamp and Deep State from facing accountability.
This reason, above all else, is why we must support President Trump in 2024. He's the only person running who has expressed a desire to put this J6 Witch Hunt to an end, and release the political prisoners, once and for all!

Peter Willis,

The contrast between Our
Revolution-endorsed Brandon Johnson and fake Democrat Paul Vallas in the
Chicago mayor’s race could not be starker.

Brandon Johnson is a union organizer and former teacher campaigning to
ensure every Chicagoan has "reliable transportation, good paying jobs,
affordable housing."

On the other hand, Paul Vallas is an anti-abortion extremist backed by
special interests, echoed Trump's attacks on Chicago, and supports
defunding Chicago's public schools.
